            100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); filter: none; }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsUmbrellaRecordIn {
            0% { opacity: .18; transform: translateX(-5px); clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0); }
            58% { opacity: .86; transform: translateX(1px); clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0); }
            100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0); }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsUmbrellaAlert {
            0%, 100% { filter: brightness(1); }
            48% { filter: brightness(1); }
            50% { filter: brightness(1.12); }
            52% { filter: brightness(.96); }
            54% { filter: brightness(1.05); }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsUmbrellaScan {
            0% { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 0; }
            8% { opacity: 1; }
            58% { opacity: .88; }
            70%, 100% { transform: translateX(760%); opacity: 0; }
        }
        @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}.mcms-open,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel.mcms-active,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::after,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn.mcms-on {
                animation: none !important;
            }
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} button {
                transition: none !important;
            }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsCyberPanelIn {
            0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px) scale(.985); filter: saturate(.5) brightness(1.35); }
            45% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-1px) scale(1.002); filter: saturate(1.35) brightness(1.08); }
            100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); filter: none; }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsCyberTabIn {
            0% { opacity: .22; transform: translateX(-4px); }
            55% { opacity: .85; transform: translateX(1px); }
            100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsCyberSignal {
            0%, 100% { filter: brightness(1); }
            48% { filter: brightness(1); }
            50% { filter: brightness(1.18); }
            52% { filter: brightness(.94); }
            54% { filter: brightness(1.08); }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsCyberScan {
            0% { transform: translateX(-110%); opacity: 0; }
            8% { opacity: 1; }
            42% { opacity: 1; }
            50%, 100% { transform: translateX(390%); opacity: 0; }
        }
        @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}.mcms-open,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel.mcms-active,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::after,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn.mcms-on {
                animation: none !important;
            }
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} button {
                transition: none !important;
            }
        }

        /* v3.8.1 Factorio industrial automation interface and readability pass. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] {
            --mcms-fac-orange: #df842f;
            --mcms-fac-orange-bright: #f1a14d;
            --mcms-fac-copper: #b96329;
            --mcms-fac-brass: #dfbd72;
            --mcms-fac-green: #a4cc69;
            --mcms-fac-cream: #f0dfb5;
            --mcms-fac-muted: #c1b28f;
            --mcms-fac-steel: #363934;
            --mcms-fac-steel-hi: #4a4d47;
            --mcms-fac-panel: #222420;
            --mcms-fac-panel-deep: #151714;
            --mcms-fac-ink: #17130e;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} * {
            font-family: "Arial Narrow", "Roboto Condensed", "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.48)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-shell {
            gap: 5px !important;
            padding: 5px !important;
            border: 2px solid #171916 !important;
            border-top-color: #676961 !important;
            border-left-color: #555750 !important;
            border-radius: 4px !important;
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 7px 7px, #9b9d95 0 1.5px, #242622 1.7px 3px, transparent 3.2px),
                radial-gradient(circle at calc(100% - 7px) 7px, #9b9d95 0 1.5px, #242622 1.7px 3px, transparent 3.2px),
                repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,.018) 0 1px, transparent 1px 8px),
                linear-gradient(160deg, #484b45, #252723 60%, #171916) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08), inset 0 -12px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.24), 0 0 0 1px rgba(226,132,46,.28) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn {
            border: 1px solid #b86a2b !important;
            border-radius: 3px !important;
            background:
                repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(240,149,51,.16) 0 5px, transparent 5px 10px),
                linear-gradient(155deg, #4b4d47, #232521) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-fac-orange-bright) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.10), inset 0 -4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.30) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 1px #000 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn:focus-visible {
            border-color: #f0a24e !important;
            background: linear-gradient(155deg, #5b574d, #302a22) !important;
            color: #ffd18a !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.13), 0 0 12px rgba(226,129,40,.28) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-dock-toggle-btn {
            border-top-color: rgba(230,151,72,.55) !important;
            background: #1c1e1b !important;
            color: #d6bd8d !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-dock-toggle-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-dock-toggle-btn:focus-visible {
            background: #2b2d28 !important;
            color: #f0a24e !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-floating-filter { gap: 5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn {
            border: 1px solid #55584f !important;
            border-top-color: #777970 !important;
            border-radius: 3px !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.045), transparent 42%),
                linear-gradient(145deg, #3b3e38, #1e201d) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-fac-cream) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.07), inset 0 -4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.28), 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.30) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.92) !important;
            transition: transform 130ms ease, border-color 130ms ease, background 130ms ease, box-shadow 130ms ease !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-1px) !important;
            border-color: #d47b2d !important;
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, #514b3f, #29261f) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.09), 0 0 9px rgba(215,117,34,.18) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-key {
            border: 1px solid #877356 !important;
            border-radius: 2px !important;
            background: #1c1e1b !important;
            color: #e5c889 !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn.mcms-on {
            border-color: #f1a34f !important;
            background:
                repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,.08) 0 2px, transparent 2px 9px),
                linear-gradient(145deg, #f0a04a, #c96b26) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-fac-ink) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.28), inset 0 -5px 10px rgba(104,42,8,.18), 0 0 12px rgba(225,126,38,.30) !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
            animation: mcmsFactorioMachinePulse 3.8s steps(1,end) infinite !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn.mcms-on *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn.mcms-on .mcms-float-key {
            color: var(--mcms-fac-ink) !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn.mcms-on .mcms-float-key {
            border-color: rgba(23,19,14,.56) !important;
            background: rgba(255,236,190,.46) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn.mcms-pin-quick {
            border-left: 4px solid #d0782b !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn.mcms-pin-custom {
            border-left: 4px solid #91b95d !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} {
            border: 2px solid #171916 !important;
            border-top-color: #64675f !important;
            border-left-color: #50534c !important;
            border-radius: 5px !important;
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 8px 8px, #979990 0 1.5px, #20221f 1.7px 3px, transparent 3.2px),
                radial-gradient(circle at calc(100% - 8px) 8px, #979990 0 1.5px, #20221f 1.7px 3px, transparent 3.2px),
                repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,.014) 0 1px, transparent 1px 9px),
                linear-gradient(155deg, #393c36, #1c1e1b 58%, #131512) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-fac-cream) !important;
            box-shadow: 0 22px 55px rgba(0,0,0,.64), 0 0 0 1px rgba(214,120,38,.30), inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.07), inset 0 -28px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.22) !important;
            scrollbar-color: #b96a2a #171916 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}.mcms-open {
            animation: mcmsFactorioPanelIn 240ms cubic-bezier(.17,.75,.24,1) both !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 9px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #171916 !important; border-left: 1px solid #44473f !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #b96a2a !important; border: 2px solid #171916 !important; border-radius: 2px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header {
            position: relative !important;
            overflow: hidden !important;
            padding-top: 15px !important;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #9a5623 !important;
            background:
                repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, #df842f 0 10px, #252723 10px 20px) 0 0 / 100% 8px no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(180deg, #434640, #242622) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 -8px 13px rgba(0,0,0,.24) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before {
            content: "AUTOMATED COMMAND NETWORK  //  ASSEMBLY CONTROL" !important;
            position: absolute !important;
            top: 9px !important;
            left: 12px !important;
            color: rgba(240,223,181,.67) !important;
            font: 900 6px/1 Consolas, monospace !important;
            letter-spacing: 1.05px !important;
            pointer-events: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::after {
            content: "" !important;
            position: absolute !important;
            left: -24% !important;
            bottom: 0 !important;
            width: 22% !important;
            height: 2px !important;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #ffae56, transparent) !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(240,143,48,.72) !important;
            animation: mcmsFactorioConveyorScan 5.6s linear infinite !important;
            pointer-events: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-drag-handle {
            color: #bfaa82 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-title {
            color: var(--mcms-fac-cream) !important;
            font-weight: 950 !important;
            letter-spacing: .35px !important;
            text-shadow: 0 2px 2px #000, 2px 2px 0 rgba(173,86,28,.34) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-subtitle {
            color: var(--mcms-fac-muted) !important;
            letter-spacing: .45px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-reset-panel,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-close {
            border: 1px solid #65685f !important;
            border-radius: 2px !important;
            background: #20221f !important;
            color: #e7d1a1 !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-reset-panel:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-close:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-reset-panel:focus-visible,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-close:focus-visible {
            border-color: #ec9743 !important;
            background: #df842f !important;
            color: var(--mcms-fac-ink) !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tabs {
            gap: 3px !important;
            padding: 4px !important;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #4d5048 !important;
            background: #181a17 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn {
            border: 1px solid #494c45 !important;
            border-radius: 2px !important;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #343731, #222420) !important;
            color: #d5c49d !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.05) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn:focus-visible {
            border-color: #bd6b2a !important;
            color: #f4d7a1 !important;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #47453e, #2b2923) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn.mcms-active {
            border-color: #f0aa5a !important;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f0a04b, #cb6d28) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-fac-ink) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.28), inset 0 -4px 8px rgba(96,40,9,.18) !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel.mcms-active {
            animation: mcmsFactorioRecordIn 190ms ease-out both !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label {
            position: relative !important;
            min-height: 25px !important;
            padding: 7px 10px 6px 28px !important;
            border: 1px solid #5b5e56 !important;
            border-left: 5px solid #d97b2c !important;
            border-radius: 2px !important;
            background:
                repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(230,139,45,.16) 0 5px, transparent 5px 10px),
                linear-gradient(180deg, #3c3f39, #252723) !important;
            color: #f0d8aa !important;
            font-size: 8px !important;
            font-weight: 950 !important;
            letter-spacing: .8px !important;
            text-transform: uppercase !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label::before {
            content: "⚙" !important;
            position: absolute !important;
            left: 8px !important;
            top: 50% !important;
            transform: translateY(-50%) !important;
            color: #f1a14d !important;
            font-size: 11px !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-place-main,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-small-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn {
            border: 1px solid #55584f !important;
            border-top-color: #73766d !important;
            border-radius: 3px !important;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #3c3f39, #222420) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-fac-cream) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06), inset 0 -4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.24) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.90) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-place-main:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-small-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn:hover {
            border-color: #d27a2c !important;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4c493f, #2c2922) !important;
            color: #ffe0a7 !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08), 0 0 9px rgba(211,116,33,.16) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn.mcms-active,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn.mcms-on,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn.mcms-active,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn.mcms-on,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn.mcms-active {
            border-color: #f1a653 !important;
            background:
                repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,.065) 0 2px, transparent 2px 10px),
                linear-gradient(145deg, #efa04a, #c96b28) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-fac-ink) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.27), inset 0 -5px 9px rgba(99,40,7,.18), 0 0 10px rgba(225,127,39,.24) !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn.mcms-active *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn.mcms-on *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn.mcms-active *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn.mcms-on *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn.mcms-active * {
            color: var(--mcms-fac-ink) !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn.mcms-active .mcms-ui-theme-copy small {
            color: #3e2a16 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-iconbox,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pill {
            border-color: #887459 !important;
            border-radius: 2px !important;
            background: #1c1e1b !important;
            color: #e7c98b !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.04) !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pill {
            min-width: 29px !important;
            padding: 2px 6px !important;
            color: #f0d29a !important;
            font-size: 8.5px !important;
            line-height: 1.1 !important;
            letter-spacing: .5px !important;
            text-align: center !important;
        }

        /* Active cards use dark text on orange; their machine-status tiles invert for clarity. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn.mcms-active .mcms-iconbox,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn.mcms-on .mcms-iconbox,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn.mcms-active .mcms-iconbox,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn.mcms-on .mcms-iconbox,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn.mcms-active .mcms-iconbox {
            border-color: #2a2118 !important;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #2e302b, #171916) !important;
            color: #f5b55f !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.30) !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn.mcms-active .mcms-pill,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn.mcms-on .mcms-pill,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn.mcms-active .mcms-pill,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn.mcms-on .mcms-pill,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn.mcms-active .mcms-pill {
            border-color: #37291a !important;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #30322d, #1a1c19) !important;
            color: #f7d99b !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.28) !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-input,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-select,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} textarea {
            border: 1px solid #686b62 !important;
            border-radius: 2px !important;
            background: #151714 !important;
            color: #f1dfb4 !important;
            caret-color: #f0a14c !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.42), 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.035) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-input::placeholder,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} textarea::placeholder {
            color: #aaa080 !important;
            opacity: 1 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-input:focus,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-select:focus,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} textarea:focus {
            border-color: #e08a34 !important;
            background: #1c1d19 !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.38), 0 0 0 2px rgba(224,132,47,.18) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-select option {
            background: #1c1e1b !important;
            color: #f1dfb4 !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-status,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-profile-main,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-finance-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-stat,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-entry,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-history-older,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-empty-state,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-empty,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-stat,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-status-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-panel-note {
            border: 1px solid #4f524a !important;
            border-left: 4px solid #a65b25 !important;
            border-radius: 2px !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.025), transparent 40%),
                linear-gradient(145deg, #30332e, #1b1d1a) !important;
            color: #ead8af !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.045), inset 0 -6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.16) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-status {
            border-color: #9c5a26 !important;
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, #3e392f, #24231e) !important;
            color: #f0d6a1 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-row-label,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-name,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-entry-title,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-profile-main strong,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-stat-value,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-entry-value {
            color: #f1dfb6 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-profile-main span,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-copy small,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-stat-label,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-entry-meta,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-state,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-stat span,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-meta {
            color: #bdb08e !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-footer {
            border-top-color: #4d5048 !important;
            background: #171916 !important;
            color: #b4a784 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-build {
            border-color: #8c592e !important;
            background: #29251f !important;
            color: #e4b675 !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.toastId} {
            border: 2px solid #181a17 !important;
            border-left: 6px solid #df842f !important;
            border-radius: 3px !important;
            background:
                repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(230,139,45,.10) 0 4px, transparent 4px 9px),
                linear-gradient(145deg, #40433d, #20221e) !important;
            color: #f1dfb4 !important;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.56), inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.cleanExitId} {
            border-color: #c56c29 !important;
            border-radius: 3px !important;
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, #3c3f39, #20221e) !important;
            color: #f0d7a6 !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} {
            border: 2px solid #1a1c19 !important;
            border-top-color: #676a61 !important;
            border-radius: 4px !important;
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 8px 8px, #92948c 0 1.5px, #20221f 1.7px 3px, transparent 3.2px),
                repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,.014) 0 1px, transparent 1px 9px),
                linear-gradient(155deg, #393c36, #181a17) !important;
            color: #f0dfb6 !important;
            box-shadow: 0 20px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.62), 0 0 0 1px rgba(206,111,31,.24) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-header,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-head,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-header {
            border-bottom: 2px solid #a55c25 !important;
            background:
                repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, #d87b2c 0 8px, #262824 8px 16px) 0 0 / 100% 6px no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(180deg, #454842, #242622) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-title,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-title {
            color: #f2ddb0 !important;
            text-shadow: 0 2px 2px #000 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-stat {
            border: 1px solid #50534b !important;
            border-radius: 2px !important;
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, #30332e, #1b1d1a) !important;
            color: #ead8ae !important;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.04) !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] .mcms-alliance-credit-badge,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] .mcms-mission-age-badge,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] .mcms-unit-commitment-badge,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] .mcms-transport-watcher-badge,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] .mcms-resource-gap-badge,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] .mcms-stuck-mission-badge,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] .mcms-mission-spawn-label {
            border-radius: 2px !important;
            font-family: "Arial Narrow", "Segoe UI", sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing: .35px !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} button:focus-visible,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} button:focus-visible,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} button:focus-visible,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} button:focus-visible,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-input:focus-visible,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-select:focus-visible {
            outline: 2px solid #ffd06f !important;
            outline-offset: 2px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} button:disabled,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} button:disabled {
            border-color: #4c4f48 !important;
            background: #252723 !important;
            color: #a9a187 !important;
            box-shadow: none !important;
            opacity: .76 !important;
            filter: grayscale(.45) saturate(.45) !important;
            animation: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} button:disabled * {
            color: #a9a187 !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-copy small,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-profile-main span,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-stat-label,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-entry-meta {
            font-size: 9px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-copy small,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-profile-main span,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-stat-label,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-entry-meta {
            font-size: 8.5px !important;
        }

        @keyframes mcmsFactorioPanelIn {
            0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(7px) scale(.987); filter: contrast(1.22) brightness(.78); }
            45% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-1px) scale(1.002); filter: contrast(1.08) brightness(1.05); }
            100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); filter: none; }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsFactorioRecordIn {
            0% { opacity: .18; transform: translateX(-5px); clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0); }
            58% { opacity: .88; transform: translateX(1px); clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0); }
            100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0); }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsFactorioConveyorScan {
            0% { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 0; }
            8% { opacity: 1; }
            58% { opacity: .88; }
            72%, 100% { transform: translateX(650%); opacity: 0; }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsFactorioMachinePulse {
            0%, 100% { filter: brightness(1); }
            46% { filter: brightness(1); }
            48% { filter: brightness(1.10); }
            50% { filter: brightness(.97); }
            52% { filter: brightness(1.05); }
        }
        @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}.mcms-open,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel.mcms-active,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::after,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn.mcms-on {
                animation: none !important;
            }
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} button {
                transition: none !important;
            }
        }

        /*
         * v3.9.2 Umbrella light-surface readability reinforcement.
         *
         * Umbrella deliberately mixes dark command chrome with sterile light
         * containment cards. Explicit child selectors are required here because
         * the original inspector/card typography rules have greater specificity
         * than broad descendant colour rules. This block sits before the global
         * semantic layer so warning/success/critical colours remain authoritative.
         */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-stat span {
            color: #4b5360 !important;
            font-size: 8px !important;
            line-height: 1.25 !important;
            letter-spacing: .35px !important;
            opacity: 1 !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-stat strong {
            color: #0d1117 !important;
            font-size: 11.5px !important;
            line-height: 1.22 !important;
            opacity: 1 !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-stat {
            border-color: #9da4ae !important;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f7f8fa, #e2e6eb) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-stat .mcms-ops-stat-label,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-entry .mcms-ops-entry-meta,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-card .mcms-sweep-state,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-card .mcms-sweep-stat span,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-card .mcms-sweep-meta,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-finance-card .mcms-ops-stat-label {
            color: #4b5360 !important;
            opacity: 1 !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-stat .mcms-ops-stat-value,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-entry .mcms-ops-entry-title,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-entry .mcms-ops-entry-value,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-card .mcms-sweep-title,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-card .mcms-sweep-stat b {
            color: #11141a !important;
            opacity: 1 !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-stat span {
            font-size: 9px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-stat strong {
            font-size: 13px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-stat span {
            font-size: 8px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-stat strong {
            font-size: 11.5px !important;
        }

        /*
         * v3.8.0 operational semantic-colour protection layer.
         *
         * Interface themes may change geometry, typography and decorative chrome, but
         * colours that communicate mission state must remain stable and unambiguous.
         */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] {
            --mcms-sem-blue: #8fd3ff;
            --mcms-sem-blue-border: rgba(100,181,246,.88);
            --mcms-sem-blue-bg: rgba(6,31,50,.92);
            --mcms-sem-green: #79f2a3;
            --mcms-sem-green-border: rgba(76,225,126,.84);
            --mcms-sem-green-bg: rgba(7,31,18,.92);
            --mcms-sem-yellow: #ffe082;
            --mcms-sem-yellow-border: rgba(255,213,79,.84);
            --mcms-sem-yellow-bg: rgba(54,41,5,.93);
            --mcms-sem-orange: #ffd0a3;
            --mcms-sem-orange-border: rgba(255,133,46,.96);
            --mcms-sem-orange-bg: rgba(80,30,3,.94);
            --mcms-sem-red: #ffe3e3;
            --mcms-sem-red-border: rgba(255,72,72,1);
            --mcms-sem-red-bg: rgba(96,8,12,.96);
            --mcms-sem-cyan: #aeeeff;
            --mcms-sem-cyan-border: rgba(98,219,255,.88);
            --mcms-sem-cyan-bg: rgba(4,22,34,.94);
            --mcms-sem-ink: #11141a;
        }

        /* Contextual alliance classification: blue where ALLIANCE is a discrete operational label. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-alliance-text,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-inspector-type.mcms-alliance,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-mission-spawn-label.mcms-alliance-text {
            color:#76c7ff !important;
            text-shadow:0 0 7px rgba(66,169,255,.24) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-inspector-type.mcms-alliance {
            border-color:rgba(70,170,255,.78) !important;
            background:rgba(5,35,63,.88) !important;
        }

        /* Alliance credit eligibility: green means eligible; yellow means no personal unit present. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-alliance-credit-badge.mcms-credit-qualified {
            border-color: var(--mcms-sem-green-border) !important;
            background: var(--mcms-sem-green-bg) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-sem-green) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #35d778, 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.34), 0 0 8px rgba(53,215,120,.18) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.92), 0 0 5px rgba(53,215,120,.24) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-alliance-credit-badge.mcms-credit-unqualified {
            border-color: var(--mcms-sem-yellow-border) !important;
            background: var(--mcms-sem-yellow-bg) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-sem-yellow) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #ffd54f, 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.34), 0 0 8px rgba(255,213,79,.14) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.92), 0 0 5px rgba(255,213,79,.18) !important;
        }

        /* Mission age: recent blue, aged yellow, high orange, critical red. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-mission-age-badge {
            border-color: var(--mcms-sem-blue-border) !important;
            background: var(--mcms-sem-blue-bg) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-sem-blue) !important;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 7px rgba(0,0,0,.28), 0 0 7px rgba(100,181,246,.17) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.92) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-mission-age-badge.mcms-age-aged {
            border-color: var(--mcms-sem-yellow-border) !important;
            background: var(--mcms-sem-yellow-bg) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-sem-yellow) !important;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 7px rgba(0,0,0,.30), 0 0 9px rgba(255,193,7,.28) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-mission-age-badge.mcms-age-high {
            border-color: var(--mcms-sem-orange-border) !important;
            background: var(--mcms-sem-orange-bg) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-sem-orange) !important;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 7px rgba(0,0,0,.32), 0 0 10px rgba(255,111,0,.38) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-mission-age-badge.mcms-age-critical {
            border-color: var(--mcms-sem-red-border) !important;
            background: var(--mcms-sem-red-bg) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-sem-red) !important;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.36), 0 0 12px rgba(255,45,45,.54) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.94), 0 0 5px rgba(255,104,104,.40) !important;
        }

        /* Unit commitment: personal units remain yellow; alliance-only units remain green. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-unit-commitment-badge.mcms-unit-personal {
            border-color: var(--mcms-sem-yellow-border) !important;
            background: var(--mcms-sem-yellow-bg) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-sem-yellow) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #ffd54f, 0 2px 7px rgba(0,0,0,.28) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.92) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-unit-commitment-badge.mcms-unit-alliance {
            border-color: var(--mcms-sem-green-border) !important;
            background: var(--mcms-sem-green-bg) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-sem-green) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #35d778, 0 2px 7px rgba(0,0,0,.28) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.92) !important;
        }

        /* Transport type: patient amber; prisoner deeper orange. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-transport-watcher-badge.mcms-transport-patient {
            border-color: rgba(255,194,71,.98) !important;
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(86,46,3,.97), rgba(27,17,6,.97)) !important;
            color: #fff1c7 !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,.50), 0 0 12px rgba(255,145,24,.58) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.92) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-transport-watcher-badge.mcms-transport-prisoner {
            border-color: rgba(255,120,38,1) !important;
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(105,31,2,.98), rgba(31,10,3,.98)) !important;
            color: #ffd0a5 !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,.52), 0 0 13px rgba(255,93,20,.64) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.94) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-transport-watcher-count {
            border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.90) !important;
            background: #ffb300 !important;
            color: var(--mcms-sem-ink) !important;
            box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.70) !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
        }

        /* Resource gaps: amber indicates missing types; red indicates uncovered demand. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-resource-gap-badge {
            border-color: rgba(255,146,49,.94) !important;
            background: rgba(58,22,3,.94) !important;
            color: #ffd29a !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,.42), 0 2px 9px rgba(255,112,20,.30) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.92) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-resource-gap-badge.mcms-gap-uncovered {
            border-color: #ff574d !important;
            background: rgba(91,11,7,.96) !important;
            color: #ffffff !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,.46), 0 0 12px rgba(255,45,35,.48) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.94) !important;
        }

        /* Stuck detection: red remains reserved for stalled and severely stalled missions. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-stuck-mission-badge {
            border-color: rgba(255,86,72,.84) !important;
            background: rgba(90,10,8,.94) !important;
            color: #ffd7d2 !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 11px rgba(255,53,39,.34) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.94) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-stuck-mission-badge.mcms-stuck-severe {
            border-color: #ff3d2e !important;
            background: rgba(130,7,4,.97) !important;
            color: #ffffff !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255,53,39,.62) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.96) !important;
        }

        /* Newly spawned incidents retain the cyan discovery signal. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-mission-spawn-label {
            border-color: var(--mcms-sem-cyan-border) !important;
            background: var(--mcms-sem-cyan-bg) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-sem-cyan) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #35bce8, 0 0 16px rgba(67,198,255,.42) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.94) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-mission-spawn-ring {
            stroke: #67d9ff !important;
            fill: rgba(48,183,255,.12) !important;
        }

        /* Mission Inspector signals. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-type.mcms-alliance {
            border-color: var(--mcms-sem-green-border) !important;
            background: rgba(7,31,18,.62) !important;
            color: var(--mcms-sem-green) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #35d778 !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.90) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-alert {
            border-color: rgba(255,181,71,.66) !important;
            background: rgba(74,42,4,.78) !important;
            color: #ffd29a !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #ffb347 !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.90) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-alert.mcms-stuck {
            border-color: rgba(255,74,64,.80) !important;
            background: rgba(82,10,8,.86) !important;
            color: #ffaaa4 !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #ff4a40 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-gap {
            border-color: rgba(255,152,52,.66) !important;
            background: rgba(77,31,4,.72) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #ff9834 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-gap-title {
            color: #ffd29a !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.90) !important;
        }

        /* Critical View uses the same escalating yellow/orange/red age language as map badges. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-age-aged {
            border-color: rgba(255,202,40,.70) !important;
            background: rgba(74,52,3,.36) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #ffd54f !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-age-high {
            border-color: rgba(255,133,46,.82) !important;
            background: rgba(88,34,4,.46) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #ff852e !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-age-critical {
            border-color: rgba(255,72,72,.90) !important;
            background: rgba(88,12,12,.62) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #ff4848 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-band {
            color: var(--mcms-sem-yellow) !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.92) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-age-high .mcms-critical-age-band {
            color: #ffb16f !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-age-critical .mcms-critical-age-band {
            color: #ff8585 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age {
            color: #bbdefb !important;
        }

        /* Discord reporting: positive green, negative red, neutral amber, busy blue. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-card[data-tone="positive"] {
            border-color: rgba(46,204,113,.68) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 4px 0 #2ecc71, 0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.22) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-card[data-tone="negative"] {
            border-color: rgba(231,76,60,.72) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 4px 0 #e74c3c, 0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.22) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-card[data-tone="neutral"] {
            border-color: rgba(241,196,15,.66) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 4px 0 #f1c40f, 0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.22) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-status[data-tone="good"] {
            border-color: rgba(46,204,113,.62) !important;
            background: rgba(10,62,33,.34) !important;
            color: #9be8b8 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-status[data-tone="bad"] {
            border-color: rgba(231,76,60,.68) !important;
            background: rgba(81,18,14,.38) !important;
            color: #ffaaa1 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-status[data-tone="busy"] {
            border-color: rgba(52,152,219,.68) !important;
            background: rgba(10,45,72,.40) !important;
            color: #9bd5ff !important;
        }

        /* Active transport sweep remains amber and visually distinct from idle. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-state.mcms-running {
            border-color: rgba(255,177,57,.82) !important;
            background: rgba(95,49,3,.84) !important;
            color: #fff1cf !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #ffb139 !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.90) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-entry.mcms-current {
            border-color: rgba(255,177,57,.78) !important;
            background: rgba(95,49,3,.30) !important;
            box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #ffb139 !important;
        }

        /*
         * Heat-map legend uses literal inline background colours. The first four
         * swatches require dark text; only the red Gap swatch retains white text.
         */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-heat-key:nth-child(-n+4) {
            color: #10140d !important;
            text-shadow: none !important;
            border-color: rgba(0,0,0,.42) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-heat-key:nth-child(5) {
            color: #ffffff !important;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.90) !important;
            border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.42) !important;
        }


        /* ============================================================
         * VEHICLE CODE STATUS · v3.9.1
         * Complete personal-fleet FMS overview. Theme chrome may vary;
         * status-code colours at the end are protected semantic signals.
         * ============================================================ */
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} {
            --mcms-vcs-bg:linear-gradient(150deg,rgba(18,26,36,.985),rgba(7,12,18,.99));
            --mcms-vcs-panel:rgba(255,255,255,.055);
            --mcms-vcs-line:rgba(255,255,255,.13);
            --mcms-vcs-text:#f4f8fc;
            --mcms-vcs-muted:#9baabc;
            display:none !important;
            position:fixed !important;
            z-index:1005 !important;
            top:68px !important;
            right:14px !important;
            width:min(540px,calc(100vw - 28px)) !important;
            max-height:calc(100vh - 84px) !important;
            overflow:auto !important;
            padding:12px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(115,170,225,.42) !important;
            border-radius:13px !important;
            background:var(--mcms-vcs-bg) !important;
            color:var(--mcms-vcs-text) !important;
            box-shadow:0 18px 44px rgba(0,0,0,.52),0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,.55) !important;
            backdrop-filter:blur(9px) saturate(115%) !important;
            -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(9px) saturate(115%) !important;
            box-sizing:border-box !important;
            isolation:isolate !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}, #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} * { box-sizing:border-box !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}.mcms-open {
            display:block !important;
            animation:mcms-vcs-open 170ms cubic-bezier(.2,.78,.28,1) both !important;
        }
        @keyframes mcms-vcs-open {
            from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(-8px) scale(.985); }
            to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) scale(1); }
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-head {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            gap:10px !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            padding-bottom:10px !important;
            border-bottom:1px solid var(--mcms-vcs-line) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-heading { min-width:0 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-title {
            display:block !important;
            color:var(--mcms-vcs-text) !important;
            font-size:14px !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            line-height:1.12 !important;
            letter-spacing:.42px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-subtitle {
            display:block !important;
            margin-top:3px !important;
            color:var(--mcms-vcs-muted) !important;
            font-size:8.5px !important;
            font-weight:800 !important;
            line-height:1.25 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-head-actions { display:flex !important; gap:6px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh,
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-close {
            display:grid !important;
            place-items:center !important;
            width:31px !important;
            height:31px !important;
            padding:0 !important;
            border:1px solid var(--mcms-vcs-line) !important;
            border-radius:8px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.075) !important;
            color:var(--mcms-vcs-text) !important;
            font-size:17px !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-close:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh:focus-visible,
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-close:focus-visible {
            border-color:#7bbcff !important;
            background:rgba(74,151,230,.20) !important;
            outline:2px solid rgba(123,188,255,.52) !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}.mcms-vcs-loading .mcms-vcs-refresh { animation:mcms-vcs-spin .8s linear infinite !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh:disabled { opacity:.62 !important; cursor:wait !important; }
        @keyframes mcms-vcs-spin { to { transform:rotate(360deg); } }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-meta {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:space-between !important;
            gap:8px !important;
            padding:8px 2px 7px !important;
            color:var(--mcms-vcs-muted) !important;
            font-size:8px !important;
            font-weight:850 !important;
            line-height:1.2 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table {
            overflow:hidden !important;
            border:1px solid var(--mcms-vcs-line) !important;
            border-radius:10px !important;
            background:rgba(0,0,0,.13) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-row {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:64px minmax(0,1fr) 88px !important;
            gap:9px !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:39px !important;
            padding:6px 9px !important;
            border-bottom:1px solid var(--mcms-vcs-line) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-row:last-child { border-bottom:0 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-head {
            min-height:32px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.07) !important;
            color:var(--mcms-vcs-muted) !important;
            font-size:8px !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            letter-spacing:.58px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-head span:last-child,
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-count,
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-total-row > *:last-child { text-align:right !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-status-row {
            position:relative !important;
            background:var(--mcms-vcs-panel) !important;
            color:var(--mcms-vcs-text) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-status-row:nth-child(even) { background:rgba(255,255,255,.027) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-status-row:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,.095) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code {
            display:grid !important;
            place-items:center !important;
            width:38px !important;
            height:27px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.42) !important;
            border-radius:7px !important;
            background:#26313d !important;
            color:#fff !important;
            font-size:12px !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.72) !important;
            box-shadow:0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.30) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-status {
            min-width:0 !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            color:var(--mcms-vcs-text) !important;
            font-size:10.5px !important;
            font-weight:850 !important;
            line-height:1.25 !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-count {
            color:var(--mcms-vcs-text) !important;
            font-size:12px !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-total-row {
            min-height:42px !important;
            border-top:1px solid rgba(123,188,255,.38) !important;
            background:rgba(55,117,180,.16) !important;
            color:var(--mcms-vcs-text) !important;
            font-size:10px !important;
            font-weight:900 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-total-row strong:last-child { font-size:13px !important; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-footnote {
            margin-top:8px !important;
            padding:7px 8px !important;
            border:1px solid var(--mcms-vcs-line) !important;
            border-radius:8px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.035) !important;
            color:var(--mcms-vcs-muted) !important;
            font-size:7.5px !important;
            font-weight:750 !important;
            line-height:1.38 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-footnote code { color:var(--mcms-vcs-text) !important; font-size:inherit !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-unknown .mcms-vcs-status { color:#ffb6b0 !important; }

        /* Tablet: touch-sized controls and a readable, bounded fleet table. */
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} {
            top:max(12px,env(safe-area-inset-top)) !important;
            right:12px !important;
            width:min(680px,calc(100vw - 24px)) !important;
            max-height:calc(100vh - 24px - env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) !important;
            padding:15px !important;
            border-radius:15px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-title { font-size:17px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-subtitle,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-meta { font-size:10px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-close { width:44px !important; height:44px !important; border-radius:11px !important; font-size:22px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-row { grid-template-columns:78px minmax(0,1fr) 104px !important; min-height:52px !important; padding:8px 12px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code { width:48px !important; height:34px !important; font-size:15px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-status { font-size:13px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-count { font-size:15px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-head,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-footnote { font-size:9.5px !important; }

        /* iOS Mobile: full-width bottom sheet; no horizontal scroll. */
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} {
            top:auto !important;
            right:0 !important;
            bottom:0 !important;
            left:0 !important;
            width:100vw !important;
            max-width:100vw !important;
            max-height:min(86vh,calc(100dvh - env(safe-area-inset-top) - 8px)) !important;
            padding:12px 10px calc(12px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) !important;
            border-right:0 !important;
            border-bottom:0 !important;
            border-left:0 !important;
            border-radius:16px 16px 0 0 !important;
            overflow-x:hidden !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}.mcms-open { animation:mcms-vcs-mobile-open 190ms cubic-bezier(.2,.78,.28,1) both !important; }
        @keyframes mcms-vcs-mobile-open { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(22px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-title { font-size:15px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-subtitle { font-size:9px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-close { width:42px !important; height:42px !important; font-size:21px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-meta { align-items:flex-start !important; flex-direction:column !important; gap:2px !important; font-size:8.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-row { grid-template-columns:48px minmax(0,1fr) 66px !important; gap:6px !important; min-height:45px !important; padding:7px 7px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-head { min-height:30px !important; font-size:7.5px !important; letter-spacing:.32px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code { width:34px !important; height:27px !important; font-size:12px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-status { font-size:10px !important; white-space:normal !important; overflow:visible !important; text-overflow:clip !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-count { font-size:12px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-footnote { font-size:7.5px !important; }

        /* Cyberpunk command terminal. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} {
            --mcms-vcs-bg:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(7,10,13,.99),rgba(15,18,20,.99));
            --mcms-vcs-panel:rgba(255,231,0,.035);
            --mcms-vcs-line:rgba(255,231,0,.28);
            --mcms-vcs-text:#f7f8f2;
            --mcms-vcs-muted:#8fd9e8;
            border-color:#ffe600 !important;
            border-radius:2px !important;
            clip-path:polygon(0 12px,12px 0,100% 0,100% calc(100% - 14px),calc(100% - 14px) 100%,0 100%) !important;
            box-shadow:0 18px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.62),inset 4px 0 #ffe600,0 0 20px rgba(0,229,255,.16) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-title { color:#ffe600 !important; text-transform:uppercase !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-close { border-radius:1px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-total-row { border-top-color:#00e5ff !important; background:rgba(0,229,255,.08) !important; }

        /* Fallout 4 / Pip-Boy fleet terminal. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} {
            --mcms-vcs-bg:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(11,25,15,.99),rgba(4,13,7,.99));
            --mcms-vcs-panel:rgba(104,255,128,.035);
            --mcms-vcs-line:rgba(121,255,144,.25);
            --mcms-vcs-text:#b9ffc7;
            --mcms-vcs-muted:#71c987;
            border-color:#79ff90 !important;
            border-radius:3px !important;
            box-shadow:0 18px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.64),inset 0 0 28px rgba(40,255,91,.06),inset 4px 0 rgba(121,255,144,.72) !important;
            text-shadow:0 0 5px rgba(88,255,121,.20) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-title { color:#9dffaf !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-close { border-radius:2px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-total-row { border-top-color:#ffbf47 !important; background:rgba(255,171,42,.10) !important; }

        /* Umbrella sterile containment console. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} {
            --mcms-vcs-bg:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(16,18,21,.995),rgba(6,7,9,.995));
            --mcms-vcs-panel:rgba(255,255,255,.048);
            --mcms-vcs-line:rgba(255,255,255,.16);
            --mcms-vcs-text:#f8f9fa;
            --mcms-vcs-muted:#b9bdc2;
            border-color:#d91f2d !important;
            border-radius:3px !important;
            box-shadow:0 18px 44px rgba(0,0,0,.62),inset 5px 0 #d91f2d !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-title { color:#fff !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-title::before { content:'CONTAINMENT // ' !important; color:#ff4b58 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-total-row { border-top-color:#d91f2d !important; background:rgba(217,31,45,.13) !important; }

        /* Factorio industrial fleet control. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} {
            --mcms-vcs-bg:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(49,49,42,.995),rgba(23,24,21,.995));
            --mcms-vcs-panel:rgba(255,145,43,.035);
            --mcms-vcs-line:rgba(223,178,110,.23);
            --mcms-vcs-text:#f2e5cc;
            --mcms-vcs-muted:#c5b38e;
            border:2px solid #805129 !important;
            border-radius:4px !important;
            box-shadow:0 18px 44px rgba(0,0,0,.62),inset 0 0 0 2px #25251f,inset 5px 0 #e77d24 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-title { color:#ffad5b !important; text-transform:uppercase !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-close { border-radius:2px !important; border-color:#805129 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-head { background:repeating-linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,157,51,.15) 0 8px,rgba(28,29,25,.38) 8px 16px) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-total-row { border-top-color:#e77d24 !important; background:rgba(231,125,36,.13) !important; }

        /* Protected FMS code colours: themes may not flatten these operational signals. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code[data-code="1"] { background:#5a97f3 !important; border-color:#a8ccff !important; color:#fff !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code[data-code="2"] { background:#77dc81 !important; border-color:#c1ffc6 !important; color:#102015 !important; text-shadow:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code[data-code="3"] { background:#f3d470 !important; border-color:#fff1ae !important; color:#1d1a0b !important; text-shadow:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code[data-code="4"] { background:#f58558 !important; border-color:#ffc1a8 !important; color:#241006 !important; text-shadow:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code[data-code="5"] { background:#e62020 !important; border-color:#ff8a83 !important; color:#fff !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code[data-code="6"] { background:#090b0e !important; border-color:#a8b1bc !important; color:#fff !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code[data-code="7"] { background:#ff8600 !important; border-color:#ffc173 !important; color:#211000 !important; text-shadow:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code[data-code="9"] { background:#f3d470 !important; border-color:#fff1ae !important; color:#1d1a0b !important; text-shadow:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code:not([data-code="1"]):not([data-code="2"]):not([data-code="3"]):not([data-code="4"]):not([data-code="5"]):not([data-code="6"]):not([data-code="7"]):not([data-code="9"]) { background:#6a2230 !important; border-color:#ff8795 !important; color:#fff !important; }

        /* v3.9.1 compact fleet dashboard: smaller footprint without reducing status legibility. */
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} {
            width:min(468px,calc(100vw - 24px)) !important;
            max-height:calc(100vh - 76px) !important;
            padding:10px !important;
            border-radius:11px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-head { gap:8px !important; padding-bottom:8px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-title { font-size:13px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-subtitle { margin-top:2px !important; font-size:8px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh,
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-close { width:29px !important; height:29px !important; font-size:16px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-meta { padding:6px 2px !important; font-size:7.7px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-row {
            grid-template-columns:54px minmax(0,1fr) 76px !important;
            gap:7px !important;
            min-height:34px !important;
            padding:4px 8px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-head { min-height:28px !important; font-size:7.6px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code { width:34px !important; height:24px !important; font-size:11px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-status { font-size:10px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-count { font-size:11.5px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-total-row { min-height:36px !important; font-size:9.4px !important; }
