        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-total-row strong:last-child { font-size:12px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-footnote { margin-top:6px !important; padding:6px 7px !important; font-size:7.2px !important; }

        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} {
            top:max(10px,env(safe-area-inset-top)) !important;
            right:10px !important;
            width:min(560px,calc(100vw - 20px)) !important;
            max-height:calc(100vh - 20px - env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) !important;
            padding:12px !important;
            border-radius:13px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-title { font-size:15px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-subtitle,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-meta { font-size:9px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-close { width:40px !important; height:40px !important; border-radius:10px !important; font-size:20px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-row {
            grid-template-columns:62px minmax(0,1fr) 82px !important;
            gap:8px !important;
            min-height:42px !important;
            padding:5px 9px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-head { min-height:29px !important; font-size:8.3px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code { width:42px !important; height:29px !important; font-size:13px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-status { font-size:11.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-count { font-size:13px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-total-row { min-height:40px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-footnote { font-size:8.2px !important; }

        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} {
            max-height:min(84vh,calc(100dvh - env(safe-area-inset-top) - 8px)) !important;
            padding:10px 8px calc(10px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-title { font-size:14px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-subtitle { font-size:8.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-refresh,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-close { width:40px !important; height:40px !important; font-size:20px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-meta {
            align-items:center !important;
            flex-direction:row !important;
            flex-wrap:wrap !important;
            gap:3px 8px !important;
            font-size:8px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-row {
            grid-template-columns:44px minmax(0,1fr) 58px !important;
            gap:5px !important;
            min-height:39px !important;
            padding:5px 6px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-table-head { min-height:28px !important; font-size:7.3px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-code { width:32px !important; height:25px !important; font-size:11px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-status { font-size:9.6px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-count { font-size:11.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-total-row { min-height:37px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-footnote { font-size:7.2px !important; }

        @media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce) {
            #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}.mcms-open,
            #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}.mcms-vcs-loading .mcms-vcs-refresh { animation:none !important; }
        }

        /* ============================================================
         * MISSION AGE WATCH · v4.3.2
         * Larger operational hierarchy, manual refresh and animated
         * semantic attention states. This block intentionally follows
         * every interface theme so status meaning cannot be flattened.
         * ============================================================ */
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} {
            width:min(392px,calc(100vw - 20px)) !important;
            max-height:calc(100vh - 88px) !important;
            padding:9px !important;
            overflow-x:hidden !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-open {
            animation:mcms-critical-drawer-enter 190ms cubic-bezier(.2,.78,.25,1) both !important;
        }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-drawer-enter {
            from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(-8px) scale(.985); }
            to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) scale(1); }
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head {
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            gap:8px !important;
            min-height:36px !important;
            padding-bottom:7px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-heading { min-width:0 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-title {
            display:block !important;
            font-size:13.5px !important;
            line-height:1.05 !important;
            letter-spacing:.4px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-subtitle {
            margin-top:3px !important;
            font-size:8px !important;
            line-height:1.22 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-refreshed {
            display:block !important;
            margin-top:3px !important;
            color:inherit !important;
            font-size:7.4px !important;
            line-height:1.1 !important;
            font-weight:850 !important;
            letter-spacing:.2px !important;
            opacity:.74 !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filters {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:auto repeat(4,minmax(34px,1fr)) !important;
            align-items:stretch !important;
            gap:3px !important;
            max-width:278px !important;
            margin-top:5px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-label {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:center !important;
            padding:0 3px !important;
            color:#a9bfd0 !important;
            font:950 6px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.45px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter {
            position:relative !important;
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:24px !important;
            gap:3px !important;
            padding:3px 5px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22) !important;
            border-radius:5px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.055) !important;
            color:#eaf4fb !important;
            font:inherit !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
            transition:transform 120ms ease,filter 120ms ease,box-shadow 120ms ease,background 120ms ease !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter span {
            font-size:7.3px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            letter-spacing:.18px !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter strong {
            font-size:8.5px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter i {
            position:absolute !important;
            right:3px !important;
            bottom:1px !important;
            font:900 4px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.1px !important;
            opacity:.48 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter:focus-visible {
            transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
            filter:brightness(1.15) !important;
            outline:2px solid currentColor !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter.mcms-filter-active {
            transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px currentColor,0 0 10px color-mix(in srgb,currentColor 40%,transparent) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter.mcms-filter-active i { opacity:1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-age-filter-all { color:#8fd4ff !important; border-color:rgba(82,178,240,.76) !important; background:rgba(8,45,70,.48) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-age-filter-8h { color:#ffe07a !important; border-color:rgba(237,190,34,.80) !important; background:rgba(72,54,4,.48) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-age-filter-16h { color:#ffb36c !important; border-color:rgba(255,132,45,.84) !important; background:rgba(78,34,5,.50) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-age-filter-24h { color:#ff8f98 !important; border-color:rgba(255,65,80,.86) !important; background:rgba(78,8,15,.52) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-actions { display:flex !important; gap:5px !important; align-items:center !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-refresh,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-close {
            display:grid !important;
            place-items:center !important;
            width:31px !important;
            height:31px !important;
            padding:0 !important;
            border:1px solid currentColor !important;
            border-radius:7px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.09) !important;
            color:inherit !important;
            font-size:17px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
            opacity:.9 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-refresh:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-close:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-refresh:focus-visible,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-close:focus-visible {
            opacity:1 !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.17) !important;
            outline:2px solid currentColor !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-refreshing .mcms-drawer-refresh { animation:mcms-critical-refresh-spin .72s linear infinite !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-refresh:disabled { cursor:wait !important; opacity:.62 !important; }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-refresh-spin { to { transform:rotate(360deg); } }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filters {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:auto repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
            align-items:stretch !important;
            gap:4px !important;
            margin-top:5px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-label {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:center !important;
            min-width:46px !important;
            padding:0 4px !important;
            color:#a9bfd0 !important;
            font:950 5.8px/1.05 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.35px !important;
            text-align:center !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter {
            position:relative !important;
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:27px !important;
            gap:5px !important;
            padding:4px 7px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18) !important;
            border-radius:6px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.055) !important;
            color:#eaf4fb !important;
            font:inherit !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
            transition:transform 130ms ease,filter 130ms ease,box-shadow 130ms ease,background 130ms ease !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter span {
            overflow:hidden !important;
            font-size:7.2px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            letter-spacing:.25px !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter strong {
            font-size:11px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter i {
            position:absolute !important;
            top:2px !important;
            right:3px !important;
            color:currentColor !important;
            font:900 4.6px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.15px !important;
            opacity:.5 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter:focus-visible {
            transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
            filter:brightness(1.14) !important;
            outline:2px solid currentColor !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter.mcms-filter-active {
            transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px currentColor,0 0 12px rgba(0,0,0,.32) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter.mcms-filter-active i {
            padding:2px 3px !important;
            border-radius:3px !important;
            background:currentColor !important;
            color:#10151b !important;
            opacity:1 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-type-personal { border-color:rgba(255,205,78,.72) !important; color:#ffe084 !important; background:rgba(66,48,4,.42) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-type-event { border-color:rgba(202,126,255,.78) !important; color:#e5b5ff !important; background:rgba(54,17,78,.48) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-type-alliance { border-color:rgba(79,174,255,.82) !important; color:#8ed1ff !important; background:rgba(4,38,68,.50) !important; }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
            gap:4px !important;
            margin-top:6px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary-card {
            min-width:0 !important;
            padding:5px 4px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16) !important;
            border-radius:7px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important;
            text-align:center !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary-card span {
            display:block !important;
            font-size:7px !important;
            line-height:1.12 !important;
            font-weight:900 !important;
            letter-spacing:.2px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            opacity:.78 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary-card strong {
            display:block !important;
            margin-top:2px !important;
            font-size:12.5px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-aged { border-color:rgba(255,202,40,.55) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-no-scene { border-color:rgba(255,72,72,.72) !important; color:#ff9d9d !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-enroute { border-color:rgba(74,190,255,.72) !important; color:#9cddff !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-assistance { border-color:rgba(255,143,45,.72) !important; color:#ffc07c !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-clearing {
            border-color:rgba(55,222,125,.78) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(8,86,44,.52),rgba(5,57,31,.34)) !important;
            color:#bdf7d2 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(55,222,125,.08),0 0 10px rgba(55,222,125,.10) !important;
            animation:mcms-critical-summary-clearing 2.6s ease-in-out infinite !important;
        }

        /* Mission Value overview and interactive Mission Age Watch filters. */
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values {
            display:block !important;
            margin-top:6px !important;
            padding:6px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(126,190,235,.24) !important;
            border-radius:8px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(7,21,34,.78),rgba(20,29,42,.68)) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.035) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-head {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:space-between !important;
            gap:8px !important;
            margin-bottom:5px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-head > span { min-width:0 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-head strong {
            display:block !important;
            color:#e8f5ff !important;
            font-size:8.2px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            letter-spacing:.55px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-head small {
            display:block !important;
            margin-top:2px !important;
            color:#a8bdcc !important;
            font-size:6.8px !important;
            line-height:1.12 !important;
            font-weight:750 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-head button {
            flex:0 0 auto !important;
            min-height:20px !important;
            padding:0 7px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.34) !important;
            border-radius:999px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.09) !important;
            color:#fff !important;
            font:900 6.8px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.3px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-head button:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-head button:focus-visible {
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.18) !important;
            outline:2px solid currentColor !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-grid {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
            gap:4px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card {
            min-width:0 !important;
            padding:5px 4px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14) !important;
            border-radius:6px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.055) !important;
            text-align:center !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card span {
            display:block !important;
            font-size:6.2px !important;
            line-height:1.08 !important;
            font-weight:900 !important;
            letter-spacing:.18px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            opacity:.82 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card strong {
            display:block !important;
            margin-top:3px !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            color:#f5fbff !important;
            font-size:10px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-value-no-scene { border-color:rgba(255,72,72,.48) !important; color:#ffaaaa !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-value-assistance { border-color:rgba(255,143,45,.52) !important; color:#ffc17c !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-value-all { border-color:rgba(98,181,255,.48) !important; color:#a9dcff !important; }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} button.mcms-critical-summary-card {
            position:relative !important;
            appearance:none !important;
            font:inherit !important;
            color:inherit !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
            transition:transform 130ms ease,filter 130ms ease,box-shadow 130ms ease,background 130ms ease !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} button.mcms-critical-summary-card:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} button.mcms-critical-summary-card:focus-visible {
            transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
            filter:brightness(1.16) !important;
            outline:2px solid currentColor !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter i {
            position:absolute !important;
            top:2px !important;
            right:3px !important;
            display:block !important;
            color:currentColor !important;
            font:900 4.8px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.18px !important;
            opacity:.48 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter.mcms-filter-active {
            transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
            filter:brightness(1.13) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px currentColor,0 0 13px rgba(0,0,0,.34) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter.mcms-filter-active i {
            padding:2px 3px !important;
            border-radius:999px !important;
            background:#f5fbff !important;
            color:#091019 !important;
            opacity:1 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-no-scene.mcms-filter-active { background:rgba(104,11,16,.88) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-enroute.mcms-filter-active { background:rgba(5,56,91,.90) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-assistance.mcms-filter-active { background:rgba(99,44,4,.90) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-clearing.mcms-filter-active { background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(8,111,54,.92),rgba(4,63,34,.92)) !important; }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-list { gap:5px !important; margin-top:6px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row {
            position:relative !important;
            isolation:isolate !important;
            display:block !important;
            min-height:0 !important;
            padding:7px 8px !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            text-align:left !important;
            transition:transform 130ms ease,filter 130ms ease,background 130ms ease !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row:hover { transform:translateY(-1px) !important; filter:brightness(1.08) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-topline {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:space-between !important;
            gap:6px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-top-identifiers {
            display:flex !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            gap:5px !important;
            flex-wrap:wrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-badge {
            display:inline-flex !important;
            min-height:17px !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            padding:2px 6px !important;
            border:1px solid currentColor !important;
            border-radius:999px !important;
            font-size:6px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            letter-spacing:.32px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-top-actions {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:flex-end !important;
            gap:4px !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-zoom,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-open {
            display:inline-flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:center !important;
            gap:3px !important;
            min-width:51px !important;
            height:23px !important;
            padding:0 6px !important;
            border-radius:6px !important;
            box-shadow:none !important;
            font:900 8px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.28px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
            opacity:.94 !important;
            transition:transform 120ms ease,filter 120ms ease,background 120ms ease !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-zoom {
            border:1px solid rgba(144,202,249,.72) !important;
            background:rgba(9,42,68,.88) !important;
            color:#c9ecff !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-open {
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.52) !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.11) !important;
            color:#fff !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-zoom:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-zoom:focus-visible,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-open:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-open:focus-visible {
            transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
            filter:brightness(1.18) !important;
            outline:2px solid currentColor !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-zoom:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-zoom:focus-visible { background:rgba(13,63,102,.96) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-open:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-open:focus-visible { background:rgba(255,255,255,.20) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-band {
            font-size:8.2px !important;
            line-height:1.08 !important;
            letter-spacing:.4px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age {
            font-size:10px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-name {
            display:block !important;
            margin-top:4px !important;
            font-size:12px !important;
            line-height:1.18 !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
            overflow:visible !important;
            text-overflow:clip !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-titleline {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:space-between !important;
            gap:6px !important;
            margin-top:4px !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-titleline .mcms-critical-name {
            min-width:0 !important;
            margin-top:0 !important;
            flex:1 1 auto !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-patients {
            display:inline-flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:center !important;
            gap:4px !important;
            flex:0 0 auto !important;
            min-height:22px !important;
            padding:3px 7px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(112,210,255,.82) !important;
            border-radius:999px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(12,72,105,.92),rgba(5,38,62,.92)) !important;
            color:#c9efff !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06),0 0 10px rgba(75,190,255,.16) !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-patients .mcms-patient-icon {
            color:#79d9ff !important;
            font:950 10px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-patients strong {
            color:#fff !important;
            font:950 10px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-patients small {
            color:#a8def5 !important;
            font:900 6.4px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.45px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-lowerline {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 118px !important;
            gap:5px !important;
            align-items:stretch !important;
            margin-top:5px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state {
            position:relative !important;
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:18px minmax(0,1fr) !important;
            gap:6px !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            margin-top:0 !important;
            padding:5px 6px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16) !important;
            border-radius:7px !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-signal {
            position:relative !important;
            display:block !important;
            width:15px !important;
            height:15px !important;
            border:2px solid currentColor !important;
            border-radius:50% !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-copy { min-width:0 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-copy strong {
            display:block !important;
            font-size:9px !important;
            line-height:1.08 !important;
            letter-spacing:.34px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-copy small {
            display:block !important;
            margin-top:2px !important;
            font-size:8px !important;
            line-height:1.17 !important;
            font-weight:750 !important;
            opacity:.9 !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-unit-grid {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
            gap:4px !important;
            margin-top:0 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-unit-chip {
            display:flex !important;
            flex-direction:column !important;
            justify-content:center !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            gap:2px !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            padding:4px 3px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14) !important;
            border-radius:7px !important;
            background:rgba(0,0,0,.20) !important;
            text-align:center !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-unit-chip strong { font-size:12px !important; line-height:1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-unit-chip small { font-size:6.6px !important; line-height:1.05 !important; font-weight:900 !important; letter-spacing:.24px !important; opacity:.82 !important; }

        /* Protected operational animation language. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-no-scene .mcms-critical-state {
            border-color:rgba(255,72,72,.82) !important;
            background:rgba(91,10,13,.72) !important;
            color:#ffb0b0 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 #ff4848 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-no-scene .mcms-critical-state-signal::before,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-no-scene .mcms-critical-state-signal::after {
            content:'' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            inset:2px !important;
            border:1px solid currentColor !important;
            border-radius:50% !important;
            animation:mcms-critical-radar 1.35s ease-out infinite !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-no-scene .mcms-critical-state-signal::after { animation-delay:.62s !important; }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-radar {
            0% { opacity:.95; transform:scale(.35); }
            100% { opacity:0; transform:scale(1.65); }
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-enroute .mcms-critical-state {
            border-color:rgba(72,188,255,.80) !important;
            background:rgba(4,47,78,.72) !important;
            color:#a9e2ff !important;
            box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 #48bcff !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-enroute .mcms-critical-state-signal {
            border:0 !important;
            border-radius:0 !important;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent 0 12%,currentColor 12% 28%,transparent 28% 36%,currentColor 36% 58%,transparent 58% 66%,currentColor 66% 94%,transparent 94%) !important;
            clip-path:polygon(0 0,62% 0,100% 50%,62% 100%,0 100%,38% 50%) !important;
            animation:mcms-critical-enroute .86s ease-in-out infinite !important;
        }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-enroute {
            0%,100% { opacity:.55; transform:translateX(-2px); }
            50% { opacity:1; transform:translateX(3px); }
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-assistance .mcms-critical-state {
            border-color:rgba(255,143,45,.88) !important;
            background:repeating-linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(91,39,3,.88) 0 10px,rgba(65,23,2,.88) 10px 20px) !important;
            color:#ffd09a !important;
            box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 #ff8f2d,0 0 12px rgba(255,116,31,.18) !important;
            animation:mcms-critical-assistance 1.15s ease-in-out infinite !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-assistance .mcms-critical-state-signal {
            border-radius:3px !important;
            transform:rotate(45deg) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-assistance .mcms-critical-state-signal::after {
            content:'!' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            inset:-3px !important;
            display:grid !important;
            place-items:center !important;
            color:currentColor !important;
            font-size:12px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            transform:rotate(-45deg) !important;
        }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-assistance {
            0%,100% { filter:brightness(1); }
            50% { filter:brightness(1.18); }
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-on-scene .mcms-critical-state {
            border-color:rgba(59,211,123,.68) !important;
            background:rgba(6,57,30,.62) !important;
            color:#a6efc3 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 #3bd37b !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-on-scene .mcms-critical-state-signal::after {
            content:'✓' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            inset:-2px !important;
            display:grid !important;
            place-items:center !important;
            font-size:11px !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
        }

        /* Positive completion state: personal units are on scene and MissionChief reports active progress. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-critical-state-clearing {
            border-color:rgba(55,222,125,.92) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(105deg,rgba(7,67,35,.96),rgba(8,45,29,.92)) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 4px 0 0 #37de7d,0 0 15px rgba(55,222,125,.18) !important;
            animation:mcms-critical-clearing-row-glow 2.8s ease-in-out infinite !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-critical-state-clearing > * {
            position:relative !important;
            z-index:2 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-critical-state-clearing::before {
            content:'' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            z-index:0 !important;
            inset:0 auto 0 0 !important;
            width:var(--mcms-clearing-progress,0%) !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(51,240,130,.08),rgba(72,232,139,.24)) !important;
            border-right:1px solid rgba(126,255,176,.62) !important;
            box-shadow:8px 0 18px rgba(55,222,125,.12) !important;
            animation:mcms-critical-clearing-fill 2.35s ease-in-out infinite !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-critical-state-clearing::after {
            content:'' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            z-index:1 !important;
            inset:0 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
            opacity:.22 !important;
            background:repeating-linear-gradient(115deg,transparent 0 20px,rgba(151,255,190,.20) 20px 22px,transparent 22px 42px) !important;
            background-size:64px 100% !important;
            animation:mcms-critical-clearing-flow 3.8s linear infinite !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-clearing .mcms-critical-age-band,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-clearing .mcms-critical-age {
            color:#aef5c9 !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-clearing .mcms-critical-state {
            border-color:rgba(72,232,139,.88) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(8,86,44,.88),rgba(5,57,31,.82)) !important;
            color:#c5f9d8 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 #48e88b !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-clearing .mcms-critical-state::after {
            content:'' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            inset:0 !important;
            z-index:-1 !important;
            background:linear-gradient(105deg,transparent 0 42%,rgba(126,255,176,.12) 50%,transparent 58% 100%) !important;
            transform:translateX(-120%) !important;
            animation:mcms-critical-clearing-sweep 2.1s ease-in-out infinite !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-clearing .mcms-critical-state-signal {
            border-color:#7ef5aa !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(72,232,139,.12),0 0 9px rgba(72,232,139,.34) !important;
            animation:mcms-critical-clearing-pulse 1.45s ease-in-out infinite !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-clearing .mcms-critical-state-signal::after {
            content:'✓' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            inset:-2px !important;
            display:grid !important;
            place-items:center !important;
            color:#d9ffe7 !important;
            font-size:11px !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
        }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-clearing-sweep {
            0%,22% { transform:translateX(-120%); opacity:0; }
            42% { opacity:1; }
            78%,100% { transform:translateX(120%); opacity:0; }
        }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-clearing-pulse {
            0%,100% { transform:scale(.94); filter:brightness(.92); }
            50% { transform:scale(1.06); filter:brightness(1.18); }
        }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-clearing-row-glow {
            0%,100% { box-shadow:inset 4px 0 0 #37de7d,0 0 12px rgba(55,222,125,.14); filter:brightness(.98); }
            50% { box-shadow:inset 4px 0 0 #5dffa0,0 0 22px rgba(55,222,125,.28); filter:brightness(1.06); }
        }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-clearing-fill {
            0%,100% { opacity:.74; filter:brightness(.96); }
            50% { opacity:1; filter:brightness(1.14); }
        }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-clearing-flow {
            from { background-position:0 0; }
            to { background-position:64px 0; }
        }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-summary-clearing {
            0%,100% { filter:brightness(.96); box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(55,222,125,.08),0 0 7px rgba(55,222,125,.08); }
            50% { filter:brightness(1.09); box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(126,255,176,.18),0 0 14px rgba(55,222,125,.19); }
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-unit-scene { border-color:rgba(59,211,123,.48) !important; color:#a6efc3 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-unit-way { border-color:rgba(72,188,255,.48) !important; color:#a9e2ff !important; }

        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} {
            width:min(510px,calc(100vw - 18px)) !important;
            max-width:calc(100vw - 18px) !important;
            max-height:80dvh !important;
            padding:10px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head { grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important; min-height:42px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-refresh,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-close { width:38px !important; height:38px !important; font-size:19px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-refreshed { font-size:8.4px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-zoom,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-open { min-width:64px !important; height:32px !important; padding:0 8px !important; font-size:9px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values { padding:7px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card strong { font-size:11px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary-card { padding:6px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary-card span { font-size:7.3px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary-card strong { font-size:14px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-patients { min-height:24px !important; padding:4px 8px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-titleline { align-items:flex-start !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-patients { min-height:20px !important; padding:3px 6px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row { padding:9px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-name { font-size:12.8px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-lowerline { grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 136px !important; gap:6px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-copy strong { font-size:9.7px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-copy small { font-size:8.7px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-unit-chip strong { font-size:14px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-unit-chip small { font-size:7.4px !important; }

        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} {
            width:calc(100vw - 8px) !important;
            max-width:calc(100vw - 8px) !important;
            max-height:min(86dvh,calc(100dvh - env(safe-area-inset-top) - 8px)) !important;
            padding:8px 7px calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-title { font-size:13px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-subtitle { font-size:7.7px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-refresh,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-close { width:38px !important; height:38px !important; font-size:19px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-refreshed { font-size:7.5px !important; white-space:normal !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-topline { align-items:flex-start !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-top-actions { gap:3px !important; flex-wrap:wrap !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-zoom,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-open { min-width:50px !important; height:30px !important; padding:0 6px !important; font-size:8px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            gap:8px !important;
            padding:5px 7px !important;
            text-align:left !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card strong { margin-top:0 !important; font-size:10.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filters { max-width:330px !important; grid-template-columns:auto repeat(4,minmax(42px,1fr)) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter { min-height:29px !important; padding:4px 7px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter span { font-size:8px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter { min-height:31px !important; padding:5px 8px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter span { font-size:7.8px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter strong { font-size:12px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filters { max-width:none !important; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; gap:3px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-label { grid-column:1 / -1 !important; min-height:12px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter { min-height:28px !important; padding:4px 5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-age-filter span { font-size:7.4px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filters { grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; gap:3px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-label { grid-column:1 / -1 !important; min-height:14px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter { min-height:29px !important; padding:4px 5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter span { font-size:6.8px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary-card span { font-size:7px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-clearing { grid-column:1 / -1 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row { padding:8px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-name { font-size:11.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-lowerline { grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 106px !important; gap:4px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-copy strong { font-size:8.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-copy small { font-size:7.5px !important; }

        /* v3.16.1: compact Mission Value rail inside the Mission Age Watch header. */
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head {
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            grid-template-rows:auto auto !important;
            column-gap:8px !important;
            row-gap:3px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-heading { grid-column:1 !important; grid-row:1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-actions { grid-column:2 !important; grid-row:1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values {
            grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
            grid-row:2 !important;
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:auto minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            align-items:stretch !important;
            gap:4px !important;
            margin:1px 0 0 !important;
            padding:5px 0 0 !important;
            border:0 !important;
            border-top:1px solid rgba(126,190,235,.20) !important;
            border-radius:0 !important;
            background:none !important;
            box-shadow:none !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-label {
            display:flex !important;
            min-width:39px !important;
            flex-direction:column !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:center !important;
            padding:0 3px !important;
            color:#d9ecf8 !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            text-align:center !important;
            cursor:help !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-label strong,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-label span {
            display:block !important;
            font-size:5.8px !important;
            line-height:1.02 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            letter-spacing:.38px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-label span { margin-top:2px !important; color:#8fb6ce !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-grid {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
            gap:3px !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card {
            display:flex !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:25px !important;
            flex-direction:column !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:center !important;
            gap:1px !important;
            padding:3px 3px !important;
            border-radius:5px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.05) !important;
            text-align:center !important;
            cursor:help !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card span {
            display:block !important;
            font-size:5.7px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            letter-spacing:.17px !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card strong {
            display:block !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
            margin:1px 0 0 !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            font-size:9.2px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-clear {
            align-self:stretch !important;
            min-width:35px !important;
            min-height:25px !important;
            padding:0 5px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.32) !important;
            border-radius:5px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.09) !important;
            color:#fff !important;
            font:900 5.8px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.2px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-clear:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-clear:focus-visible {
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.18) !important;
            outline:2px solid currentColor !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary { margin-top:5px !important; }

        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values {
            padding:5px 0 0 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card {
            min-height:28px !important;
            padding:3px 5px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card span { font-size:6.3px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card strong { font-size:10.2px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-label strong,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-label span { font-size:6.2px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-clear { min-height:28px !important; font-size:6.2px !important; }

        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values {
            grid-template-columns:34px minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            gap:3px !important;
            margin-top:1px !important;
            padding:4px 0 0 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-grid {
            grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
            gap:2px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card {
            display:flex !important;
            min-height:24px !important;
            grid-template-columns:none !important;
            gap:1px !important;
            padding:3px 2px !important;
            text-align:center !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card span { font-size:5.1px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card strong { margin-top:1px !important; font-size:8.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-label { min-width:34px !important; padding:0 1px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-label strong,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-label span { font-size:5.1px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-clear { min-width:31px !important; min-height:24px !important; padding:0 3px !important; font-size:5.1px !important; }

        /* v3.13.2: dock Mission Age Watch over the native mission list instead of the map. */
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-sidebar-docked {
            left:var(--mcms-critical-dock-left) !important;
            right:auto !important;
            top:var(--mcms-critical-dock-top) !important;
            bottom:auto !important;
            width:var(--mcms-critical-dock-width) !important;
            max-width:var(--mcms-critical-dock-width) !important;
            height:var(--mcms-critical-dock-height) !important;
            max-height:var(--mcms-critical-dock-height) !important;
            transform:none !important;
            border-radius:12px !important;
            overscroll-behavior:contain !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-sidebar-docked.mcms-open {
            animation:mcms-critical-docked-enter 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,.78,.25,1) both !important;
        }
        @keyframes mcms-critical-docked-enter {
            from { opacity:0; clip-path:inset(0 0 0 12px); }
            to { opacity:1; clip-path:inset(0 0 0 0); }
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-sidebar-docked {
            left:var(--mcms-critical-dock-left) !important;
            right:auto !important;
            top:var(--mcms-critical-dock-top) !important;
            bottom:auto !important;
            width:var(--mcms-critical-dock-width) !important;
            max-width:var(--mcms-critical-dock-width) !important;
            height:var(--mcms-critical-dock-height) !important;
            max-height:var(--mcms-critical-dock-height) !important;
            transform:none !important;
            padding:10px !important;
            border-radius:12px !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-alliance-buildings-map="disabled"] .mcms-alliance-buildings-map-column {
            display:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-alliance-buildings-map="disabled"] .mcms-alliance-buildings-list-column {
            width:100% !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
            flex:0 0 100% !important;
            float:none !important;
            margin-left:0 !important;
        }
        #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:space-between !important;
            gap:12px !important;
            margin:0 0 10px !important;
            padding:10px 12px !important;
            border:1px solid #3f91d8 !important;
            border-left:4px solid #3f91d8 !important;
            border-radius:5px !important;
            background:#182532 !important;
            color:#eef7ff !important;
            box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.22) !important;
            font-family:Arial,sans-serif !important;
            line-height:1.25 !important;
        }
        #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice.mcms-alliance-map-enabled {
            margin:0 0 8px !important;
            padding:7px 9px !important;
        }
        #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice .mcms-alliance-map-copy {
            min-width:0 !important;
            display:flex !important;
            flex-direction:column !important;
            gap:2px !important;
        }
        #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice strong {
            color:inherit !important;
            font-size:13px !important;
            font-weight:800 !important;
        }
        #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice small {
            color:#b9c9d8 !important;
            font-size:10.5px !important;
        }
        #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice button {
            flex:0 0 auto !important;
            min-height:34px !important;
            padding:7px 11px !important;
            border:1px solid #7cc5ff !important;
            border-radius:4px !important;
            background:#256ca5 !important;
            color:#fff !important;
            font-size:11px !important;
            font-weight:800 !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
        }
        #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice button:hover,
        #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice button:focus-visible {
            background:#3186c7 !important;
            outline:2px solid #fff !important;
            outline-offset:2px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice { border-color:#fcee0a !important; border-left-color:#fcee0a !important; background:#11161b !important; color:#fcee0a !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice button { border-color:#fcee0a !important; background:#fcee0a !important; color:#111 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice { border-color:#8cff66 !important; border-left-color:#8cff66 !important; background:#111b12 !important; color:#b8ff9d !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice button { border-color:#8cff66 !important; background:#284f23 !important; color:#eaffdf !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice { border-color:#d82632 !important; border-left-color:#d82632 !important; background:#17191d !important; color:#fff !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice button { border-color:#f05c65 !important; background:#b1121c !important; color:#fff !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice { border-color:#f6922d !important; border-left-color:#f6922d !important; background:#292a25 !important; color:#f7ead2 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice button { border-color:#f9bd75 !important; background:#bd5f13 !important; color:#fff4df !important; }
        @media (max-width:700px) {
            #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice { align-items:stretch !important; flex-direction:column !important; }
            #mcms-alliance-buildings-map-notice button { width:100% !important; min-height:40px !important; }
        }


        /* v4.8.4: payout effects are constrained to the Leaflet map stacking context. */
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[popover] { position:absolute !important; }

        /* v4.8.3 Major Incident Feed — permanent full-width strip beneath MissionChief navigation. */
        @keyframes mcmsIncidentWireScroll {
            from { transform:translate3d(0,0,0); }
            to { transform:translate3d(-50%,0,0); }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsIncidentWireScan {
            0% { transform:translateX(-120%); opacity:0; }
            20% { opacity:.45; }
            65% { opacity:.18; }
            100% { transform:translateX(220%); opacity:0; }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsFalloutIncidentSweep {
            0% { transform:translateX(-135%); opacity:0; }
            18% { opacity:.5; }
            55% { opacity:.16; }
            100% { transform:translateX(330%); opacity:0; }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsFalloutIncidentBeacon {
            0%,100% { opacity:.58; filter:brightness(.92); }
            50% { opacity:1; filter:brightness(1.28); }
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} {
            position:fixed !important;
            z-index:1032 !important;
            display:none;
            align-items:center !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            height:34px !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            border:1px solid #467ca4 !important;
            border-radius:4px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#172836 0%,#0f1d28 100%) !important;
            color:#eef8ff !important;
            box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.34),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.035) !important;
            font-family:Arial,sans-serif !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            isolation:isolate !important;
            pointer-events:auto !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}.mcms-feed-visible { display:flex !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}::before {
            content:"";
            position:absolute;
            inset:0 auto 0 -30%;
            width:25%;
            pointer-events:none;
            z-index:3;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(97,196,255,.18),transparent);
            animation:mcmsIncidentWireScan 7s linear infinite;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}[data-mcms-placement="underbar"] {
            height:30px !important;
            border-radius:3px !important;
            max-width:none !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label {
            position:relative;
            z-index:4;
            flex:0 0 auto;
            align-self:stretch;
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:6px;
            padding:0 10px;
            border-right:1px solid rgba(126,202,255,.34);
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#24628e,#173e5b);
            color:#fff;
            font-size:9px;
            font-weight:900;
            letter-spacing:.75px;
            text-transform:uppercase;
            white-space:nowrap;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label::before {
            content:"●";
            color:#ff4655;
            font-size:9px;
            text-shadow:0 0 7px rgba(255,70,85,.9);
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-viewport {
            position:relative;
            z-index:2;
            flex:1 1 auto;
            min-width:0;
            height:100%;
            overflow:hidden;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-track {
            display:flex;
            align-items:stretch;
            width:max-content;
            min-width:100%;
            height:100%;
            will-change:transform;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}:not(.mcms-feed-empty):not(.mcms-feed-static) .mcms-incident-feed-track {
            animation:mcmsIncidentWireScroll var(--mcms-incident-feed-duration,60s) linear infinite;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}.mcms-feed-static .mcms-incident-feed-track {
            width:100% !important;
            min-width:100% !important;
            animation:none !important;
            transform:none !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}.mcms-feed-static .mcms-incident-feed-group {
            flex:1 1 auto !important;
            justify-content:center !important;
            padding-right:0 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}.mcms-feed-static .mcms-incident-feed-group:nth-child(n+2) {
            display:none !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}:hover .mcms-incident-feed-track,
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}:focus-within .mcms-incident-feed-track,
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}.mcms-feed-paused .mcms-incident-feed-track {
            animation-play-state:paused !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-group {
            display:flex;
            align-items:stretch;
            flex:0 0 auto;
            height:100%;
            padding-right:34px;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-item {
            appearance:none;
            -webkit-appearance:none;
            position:relative;
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:7px;
            height:100%;
            margin:0;
            padding:0 14px;
            border:0;
            border-right:1px solid rgba(164,205,232,.17);
            background:transparent;
            color:inherit;
            font:inherit;
            white-space:nowrap;
            cursor:pointer;
            transition:background .16s ease,filter .16s ease;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-item:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-item:focus-visible {
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.09);
            outline:2px solid #fff;
            outline-offset:-2px;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-level {
            flex:0 0 auto;
            padding:3px 5px;
            border:1px solid currentColor;
            border-radius:2px;
            color:#ff6974;
            font-size:8px;
            font-weight:900;
            letter-spacing:.45px;
            text-transform:uppercase;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-name {
            color:#fff;
            font-size:11px;
            font-weight:800;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-postcode {
            color:#9bd9ff;
            font-size:10px;
            font-weight:900;
            letter-spacing:.35px;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-meta {
            color:#bed0dd;
            font-size:9px;
            font-weight:700;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-state {
            display:inline-flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:4px;
            font-size:8px;
            font-weight:900;
            letter-spacing:.35px;
            text-transform:uppercase;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-state::before {
            content:"";
            width:6px;
            height:6px;
            border-radius:50%;
            background:currentColor;
            box-shadow:0 0 7px currentColor;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-alert .mcms-incident-state { color:#ff5967; }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-responding .mcms-incident-state { color:#63b8ff; }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-clearing .mcms-incident-state { color:#71e58a; }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-active .mcms-incident-state { color:#ffd568; }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-major .mcms-incident-state { color:#ff8a62; }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-empty {
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            height:100%;
            padding:0 14px;
            color:#c4d4df;
            font-size:9.5px;
            font-weight:700;
            letter-spacing:.2px;
        }

        /* Cyberpunk incident wire. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} {
            border-color:#fcee0a !important;
            border-radius:0 !important;
            background:#0c1116 !important;
            color:#e8fdff !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(0,240,255,.32),0 0 17px rgba(252,238,10,.18) !important;
            clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 11px) 0,100% 11px,100% 100%,8px 100%,0 calc(100% - 8px));
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label {
            border-right-color:#00f0ff !important;
            background:#fcee0a !important;
            color:#111 !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label::before { color:#111 !important; text-shadow:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-name { color:#fff !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-postcode { color:#00f0ff !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-level { color:#fcee0a !important; }

        /* Fallout 4 / Pip-Boy incident band. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} {
            border:1px solid #78d85b !important;
            border-radius:1px !important;
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 14% 50%,rgba(151,255,107,.09),transparent 29%),
                repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(183,255,145,.025) 0 1px,transparent 1px 5px),
                linear-gradient(180deg,#172419 0%,#0b140d 100%) !important;
            color:#c8ffae !important;
            box-shadow:
                0 0 0 1px rgba(18,39,17,.95),
                0 0 13px rgba(98,242,75,.24),
                inset 0 0 18px rgba(91,213,69,.10),
                inset 0 1px rgba(216,255,194,.09) !important;
            font-family:"Courier New",Consolas,monospace !important;
            text-shadow:0 0 5px rgba(126,255,91,.34) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}::before {
            width:18% !important;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(169,255,126,.28),transparent) !important;
            animation:mcmsFalloutIncidentSweep 6.8s linear infinite !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}::after {
            content:"";
            position:absolute;
            inset:0;
            z-index:5;
            pointer-events:none;
            opacity:.28;
            background:
                repeating-linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 0 2px,rgba(173,255,139,.13) 2px 3px),
                linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(8,16,9,.2),transparent 14%,transparent 86%,rgba(8,16,9,.2));
            mix-blend-mode:screen;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label {
            gap:5px !important;
            border-right:1px solid #8be56a !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(120,216,91,.15),rgba(44,91,38,.09)),
                repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,#254326 0 4px,#203a21 4px 8px) !important;
            color:#d4ffbd !important;
            box-shadow:inset -1px 0 rgba(207,255,181,.08) !important;
            text-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(150,255,109,.52) !important;
            letter-spacing:.9px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label::before {
            content:"◉" !important;
            color:#ffc95e !important;
            font-size:9px !important;
