            text-shadow:0 0 7px rgba(255,201,94,.85) !important;
            animation:mcmsFalloutIncidentBeacon 1.8s steps(2,end) infinite !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label::after {
            content:"ROBCO";
            display:inline-flex;
            align-items:center;
            height:14px;
            padding:0 3px;
            border:1px solid rgba(177,255,142,.38);
            color:#92d97b;
            font-size:6px;
            font-weight:900;
            letter-spacing:.55px;
            text-shadow:none;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-viewport {
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(101,217,77,.035),transparent 20%,transparent 80%,rgba(101,217,77,.025)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-item {
            border-right-color:rgba(151,232,120,.20) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-item:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-item:focus-visible {
            background:rgba(125,224,91,.13) !important;
            outline-color:#f4c766 !important;
            filter:brightness(1.08) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-name {
            color:#dcffcb !important;
            text-shadow:0 0 5px rgba(143,255,104,.28) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-postcode {
            color:#ffd16f !important;
            text-shadow:0 0 5px rgba(255,209,111,.24) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-meta {
            color:#9edb88 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-level {
            border-color:#f2c661 !important;
            background:rgba(242,198,97,.08) !important;
            color:#ffd16f !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-empty {
            color:#a9e492 !important;
        }

        /* Umbrella containment wire. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} {
            border-color:#d82632 !important;
            border-radius:1px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#1d2025,#101216) !important;
            color:#fff !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.09),0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,.45) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label {
            border-right-color:#fff !important;
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,#b1121c 0 48%,#f0f1f2 48% 52%,#15171a 52%) !important;
            color:#fff !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-name { color:#fff !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-postcode { color:#ffabb0 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-meta { color:#c9cdd2 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-level { color:#ff6570 !important; }

        /* Factorio industrial incident bus. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} {
            border-color:#d87822 !important;
            border-radius:2px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#34352f,#20211e) !important;
            color:#f5ead6 !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 0 1px #111,0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.48),inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.05) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label {
            border-right-color:#f6a34c !important;
            background:repeating-linear-gradient(135deg,#d87822 0 8px,#332d24 8px 16px) !important;
            color:#fff3dc !important;
            text-shadow:0 1px 1px #111 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-name { color:#fff3df !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-postcode { color:#ffad5b !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-meta { color:#d9c8aa !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-level { color:#ffad5b !important; }

        /* Mission Age Watch live completion timer and travelling-state treatment. */
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-clear-countdown {
            display:inline-flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            min-height:22px !important;
            padding:2px 6px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(93,238,147,.72) !important;
            border-radius:999px !important;
            background:rgba(4,60,30,.86) !important;
            color:#cdf9dc !important;
            font:950 7.4px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.2px !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.04),0 0 8px rgba(55,222,125,.14) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-critical-state-enroute {
            border-color:rgba(72,188,255,.90) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(4,55,88,.82),rgba(7,31,52,.74)) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 4px 0 0 #48bcff,0 0 12px rgba(72,188,255,.18) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-critical-has-enroute:not(.mcms-critical-state-enroute):not(.mcms-critical-state-clearing) {
            border-right-color:rgba(72,188,255,.90) !important;
            box-shadow:inset -4px 0 0 #48bcff !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-clear-countdown {
            min-height:20px !important;
            padding-inline:5px !important;
            font-size:6.9px !important;
        }

        /* Final alliance classification layer: blue survives every interface theme. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-alliance-text,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-alliance-text,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-inspector-type.mcms-alliance,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] .mcms-mission-spawn-label.mcms-alliance-text {
            color:#76c7ff !important;
            text-shadow:0 0 7px rgba(66,169,255,.26) !important;
        }

        /* Mission Age Watch type semantics: Personal gold, Event purple, Alliance blue. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter.mcms-type-personal,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-badge.mcms-type-personal {
            border-color:rgba(255,205,78,.84) !important;
            color:#ffe084 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter.mcms-type-event,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-badge.mcms-type-event {
            border-color:rgba(202,126,255,.88) !important;
            color:#e5b5ff !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter.mcms-type-alliance,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-badge.mcms-type-alliance {
            border-color:rgba(79,174,255,.90) !important;
            color:#8ed1ff !important;
        }

        @media (max-width:760px) {
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label::after { display:none !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label { padding:0 7px !important; font-size:7.5px !important; letter-spacing:.4px !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-item { gap:5px !important; padding:0 10px !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-name { font-size:10px !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-postcode { font-size:9px !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-meta { font-size:8px !important; }
        }


        /* v3.19.0 Mission Age Watch expansion, location intelligence and distance ordering. */
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-expand {
            display:inline-grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:auto auto !important;
            place-items:center !important;
            gap:3px !important;
            min-width:58px !important;
            height:31px !important;
            padding:0 6px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(123,205,255,.72) !important;
            border-radius:7px !important;
            background:rgba(8,48,74,.86) !important;
            color:#bfeaff !important;
            font:950 12px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
            opacity:.94 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-expand small {
            color:inherit !important;
            font:950 5.6px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.22px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-expand:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-expand:focus-visible,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-expand.mcms-on {
            background:rgba(14,87,128,.96) !important;
            color:#fff !important;
            outline:2px solid currentColor !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(73,185,255,.22) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-open.mcms-critical-expanded {
            display:flex !important;
            flex-direction:column !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-drawer-head,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-critical-type-filters,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-critical-summary {
            flex:0 0 auto !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-drawer-list {
            flex:1 1 auto !important;
            min-height:0 !important;
            overflow-y:auto !important;
            overscroll-behavior:contain !important;
            scrollbar-width:thin !important;
            padding-right:2px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-controls {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:auto repeat(3,minmax(42px,1fr)) !important;
            align-items:stretch !important;
            gap:3px !important;
            max-width:278px !important;
            margin-top:4px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-label {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:center !important;
            padding:0 3px !important;
            color:#a9bfd0 !important;
            font:950 6px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.45px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-button {
            position:relative !important;
            display:grid !important;
            place-items:center !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:21px !important;
            padding:3px 5px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.20) !important;
            border-radius:5px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.055) !important;
            color:#dbeaf4 !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
            transition:transform 120ms ease,filter 120ms ease,box-shadow 120ms ease !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-button span {
            font:950 6.8px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.18px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-button i {
            position:absolute !important;
            right:2px !important;
            bottom:1px !important;
            font:900 3.8px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            opacity:.45 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-button:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-button:focus-visible,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-button.mcms-filter-active {
            transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
            filter:brightness(1.17) !important;
            outline:2px solid currentColor !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-button.mcms-filter-active {
            color:#9fdcff !important;
            border-color:#58bdf5 !important;
            background:rgba(6,62,96,.86) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px currentColor,0 0 10px rgba(72,188,255,.18) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-button.mcms-filter-active i { opacity:1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-location {
            display:inline-flex !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            gap:3px !important;
            flex-wrap:wrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-city,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-postcode,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-distance {
            display:inline-flex !important;
            min-height:17px !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            padding:2px 5px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22) !important;
            border-radius:999px !important;
            background:rgba(4,12,20,.72) !important;
            color:#edf7ff !important;
            font:900 5.8px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.18px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-city { color:#f5f7fa !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-postcode { border-color:rgba(88,194,255,.64) !important; color:#9fddff !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-distance { border-color:rgba(106,224,196,.55) !important; color:#aef3df !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-expand {
            min-width:74px !important;
            height:44px !important;
            border-radius:10px !important;
            font-size:16px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-expand small { font-size:6.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-controls { max-width:340px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-button { min-height:27px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-button span { font-size:7.8px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-city,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-postcode,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-distance {
            min-height:19px !important;
            padding-inline:6px !important;
            font-size:6.8px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-expand { display:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-controls {
            grid-template-columns:auto repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
            max-width:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-location { gap:2px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-city,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-postcode,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-distance {
            min-height:16px !important;
            padding-inline:4px !important;
            font-size:5.4px !important;
        }


        /* v3.20.1 Mission Age Watch official-event metadata plus exact-title fallback detection. */
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-heading { display:block !important; min-width:0 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-identity,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-header-controls { min-width:0 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filters {
            grid-template-columns:auto repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter:not(.mcms-filter-active) {
            opacity:.62 !important;
            filter:saturate(.72) brightness(.88) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter.mcms-filter-active {
            opacity:1 !important;
            filter:none !important;
            transform:translateY(-1px) scale(1.01) !important;
            outline:2px solid currentColor !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px currentColor,0 0 16px color-mix(in srgb,currentColor 42%,transparent) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter.mcms-filter-active span,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter.mcms-filter-active strong { color:inherit !important; opacity:1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-type-all { border-color:rgba(215,233,246,.78) !important; color:#eaf7ff !important; background:rgba(35,55,70,.54) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-type-all.mcms-filter-active { background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(40,82,108,.96),rgba(20,47,67,.96)) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-type-personal.mcms-filter-active { background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(104,73,4,.96),rgba(57,38,2,.96)) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-type-event.mcms-filter-active { background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(90,31,124,.96),rgba(46,14,67,.96)) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-type-alliance.mcms-filter-active { background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(6,75,122,.96),rgba(3,38,69,.96)) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-special-event {
            display:inline-flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            gap:3px !important;
            min-height:17px !important;
            padding:2px 6px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,99,190,.92) !important;
            border-radius:999px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(112,12,75,.94),rgba(65,8,51,.94)) !important;
            color:#ffd4ef !important;
            font:950 5.8px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.24px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,56,172,.20) !important;
            animation:mcms-special-event-pulse 2.4s ease-in-out infinite !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-special-event > span { color:#fff2a6 !important; font-size:7px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-critical-developer-event { border-top-color:rgba(255,82,184,.82) !important; }
        @keyframes mcms-special-event-pulse {
            0%,100% { filter:brightness(.96); box-shadow:0 0 7px rgba(255,56,172,.13); }
            50% { filter:brightness(1.12); box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(255,56,172,.30); }
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-drawer-head {
            align-items:start !important;
            padding-bottom:6px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-drawer-heading {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(min(100%,280px),1fr)) !important;
            align-items:start !important;
            gap:8px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-drawer-header-controls {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(min(100%,210px),1fr)) !important;
            gap:6px !important;
            align-items:start !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-critical-age-filters,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-critical-sort-controls {
            max-width:none !important;
            width:100% !important;
            margin-top:0 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-drawer-list {
            display:flex !important;
            flex-direction:column !important;
            align-items:stretch !important;
            gap:5px !important;
            overflow-y:auto !important;
            overflow-x:hidden !important;
            min-height:0 !important;
            padding:0 3px 8px 0 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-critical-row {
            flex:0 0 auto !important;
            width:100% !important;
            height:auto !important;
            min-height:max-content !important;
            max-height:none !important;
            contain:none !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-critical-name,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-critical-state-copy small {
            overflow:visible !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
            text-overflow:clip !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-critical-lowerline {
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 126px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filters {
            grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-label { grid-column:1 / -1 !important; }


        /*
         * v4.0.0 007 Intelligence / MI6 interface.
         * Luxury black-tie command styling with hosted custom 007 artwork.
         * Operational mission-state colours remain governed by the final semantic layers.
         */
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-bond007 {
            position:relative !important;
            border-radius:2px !important;
            border-color:#c8aa5b !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(255,255,255,.96),rgba(224,219,205,.93)),
                #f2eee2 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,.12),0 0 9px rgba(200,170,91,.24) !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-bond007::before {
            content:"" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            inset:4px !important;
            background-image:url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Logo}") !important;
            background-repeat:no-repeat !important;
            background-position:center !important;
            background-size:contain !important;
            z-index:2 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-bond007::after {
            content:"MI6" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            right:3px !important;
            bottom:2px !important;
            color:#8d171f !important;
            font:950 5px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.8px !important;
            z-index:3 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-bond007 span { opacity:0 !important; }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] {
            --mcms-bond-black:#07080a;
            --mcms-bond-charcoal:#15171a;
            --mcms-bond-panel:#1d2024;
            --mcms-bond-panel-2:#282c31;
            --mcms-bond-ivory:#f1ede2;
            --mcms-bond-ivory-2:#d8d1bf;
            --mcms-bond-gold:#c8aa5b;
            --mcms-bond-gold-bright:#efd38a;
            --mcms-bond-red:#a71924;
            --mcms-bond-steel:#8b939b;
            --mcms-bond-muted:#aeb4b9;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-shell {
            border:1px solid rgba(220,199,137,.70) !important;
            border-radius:3px !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(35,38,42,.98),rgba(7,8,10,.99)),
                repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.012) 0 1px,transparent 1px 7px) !important;
            box-shadow:0 11px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.55),inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08),0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,.75) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-dock-toggle-btn {
            border:1px solid #5d6268 !important;
            border-radius:2px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#272a2f,#0b0c0e) !important;
            color:#f2ede2 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.10),0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.45) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-dock-toggle-btn:hover {
            border-color:#d2b662 !important;
            color:#f3d989 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.12),0 0 12px rgba(202,170,84,.22) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn {
            border:1px solid #4b5056 !important;
            border-radius:2px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#25282c,#101215) !important;
            color:#eee9dd !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06),0 3px 7px rgba(0,0,0,.36) !important;
            transition:border-color .15s ease,transform .15s ease,box-shadow .15s ease !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn:hover {
            transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
            border-color:#c8aa5b !important;
            color:#fff7e4 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn.mcms-on,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn.mcms-on {
            border-color:#f0d583 !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#eee6d1,#c8b98f) !important;
            color:#111214 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.48),0 0 12px rgba(208,178,92,.30) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn.mcms-on *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn.mcms-on * {
            color:#111214 !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-key {
            border-radius:50% !important;
            border:1px solid #a88e48 !important;
            background:#0b0c0e !important;
            color:#f0d47e !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} {
            border:1px solid #a88e48 !important;
            border-radius:4px !important;
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 92% 5%,rgba(214,183,92,.08),transparent 24%),
                repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.012) 0 1px,transparent 1px 8px),
                linear-gradient(145deg,#202328,#090a0c 64%) !important;
            color:#f0ecdf !important;
            box-shadow:0 22px 55px rgba(0,0,0,.68),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.035),0 0 18px rgba(175,143,59,.12) !important;
            font-family:"Segoe UI",Arial,sans-serif !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}.mcms-open {
            animation:mcmsBondPanelIn 280ms cubic-bezier(.18,.76,.22,1) both !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header {
            position:relative !important;
            min-height:45px !important;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(212,184,99,.62) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.045),transparent 64%) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before {
            content:"" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            right:62px !important;
            top:4px !important;
            width:92px !important;
            height:31px !important;
            background-image:url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Logo}") !important;
            background-repeat:no-repeat !important;
            background-position:center !important;
            background-size:contain !important;
            filter:invert(1) sepia(.18) saturate(.65) brightness(1.25) !important;
            opacity:.82 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::after {
            content:"CLASSIFIED // DOUBLE-O OPERATIONS" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            left:8px !important;
            bottom:1px !important;
            color:#c9ad60 !important;
            font:900 5px/1 Consolas,monospace !important;
            letter-spacing:.75px !important;
            opacity:.78 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-drag-handle {
            border:0 !important;
            border-left:3px solid #a71924 !important;
            border-radius:0 !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.025) !important;
            padding-bottom:8px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-title {
            color:#f4efe2 !important;
            font-family:Georgia,"Times New Roman",serif !important;
            font-weight:700 !important;
            letter-spacing:.35px !important;
            text-shadow:0 1px 2px #000 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-subtitle {
            color:#b6b8b8 !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-reset-panel {

        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-close:hover {
            border-color:#d44349 !important;

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-reset-panel:hover {

        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tabs {
            gap:4px !important;

            padding-bottom:6px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn {
            border:1px solid #44494f !important;
            border-radius:1px !important;

        }

            border-color:#e3c875 !important;

            --mcms-lock-primary:#e2c56f;
            --mcms-lock-secondary:#f7f1e3;
            --mcms-lock-accent:#ad1822;
            --mcms-lock-surface:rgba(9,10,12,.95);
            --mcms-lock-grid:rgba(226,197,111,.09);
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] .mcms-mission-lock-label {
            border-radius:2px !important;
            font-family:Consolas,monospace !important;
        }

        /* James Bond 007 payout flash. */
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-red {
            background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 0% 50%,rgba(171,16,27,.72),rgba(94,4,10,.30) 34%,transparent 68%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-blue {
            background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 100% 50%,rgba(232,205,119,.58),rgba(124,98,33,.22) 34%,transparent 68%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-cinematic {
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,transparent 0 14%,rgba(0,0,0,.22) 42%,rgba(0,0,0,.86) 100%),
                linear-gradient(125deg,rgba(181,21,31,.08),transparent 34%,rgba(219,189,96,.07)) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-a {
            opacity:.8 !important;
            background:
                repeating-conic-gradient(from -12deg at 50% 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.16) 0 3deg,rgba(0,0,0,.80) 3deg 13deg),
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,transparent 0 15%,rgba(0,0,0,.15) 15.5% 27%,transparent 27.5%) !important;
            mix-blend-mode:soft-light !important;
            animation:mcmsBondGunBarrel 9s linear infinite !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
            background:
                linear-gradient(90deg,transparent calc(50% - .5px),rgba(235,211,137,.28) 50%,transparent calc(50% + .5px)),
                linear-gradient(0deg,transparent calc(50% - .5px),rgba(235,211,137,.24) 50%,transparent calc(50% + .5px)),
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,transparent 0 10%,rgba(218,190,103,.20) 10.4% 10.8%,transparent 11.2% 19%,rgba(218,190,103,.12) 19.4% 19.8%,transparent 20.2%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-c {
            background:
                linear-gradient(110deg,transparent 0 42%,rgba(255,255,255,.08) 47%,rgba(240,211,123,.15) 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.06) 53%,transparent 58%),
                repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,transparent 0 119px,rgba(255,255,255,.025) 120px,transparent 121px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            width:min(780px,calc(100% - 28px)) !important;
            padding:30px 42px 27px !important;
            border:1px solid #d5b95f !important;
            border-left:7px solid #a71924 !important;
            border-radius:2px !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Logo}") right 24px top 20px / 150px auto no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(118deg,rgba(245,240,226,.985),rgba(211,203,180,.98)) !important;
            color:#101214 !important;
            box-shadow:0 30px 76px rgba(0,0,0,.78),0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.20),inset 0 -5px 0 #111214 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::before {
            content:"TOP SECRET // MI6 FINANCIAL AUTHORISATION" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            left:22px !important;
            right:22px !important;
            top:9px !important;
            color:#8f171f !important;
            font:950 7px/1 Consolas,monospace !important;
            letter-spacing:1.2px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::after {
            content:"007" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            right:25px !important;
            bottom:10px !important;
            color:rgba(17,18,20,.35) !important;
            font:950 9px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:2px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title {
            max-width:78% !important;
            color:#111214 !important;
            font-family:Georgia,"Times New Roman",serif !important;
            font-size:clamp(32px,5vw,61px) !important;
            font-weight:700 !important;
            letter-spacing:.9px !important;
            transform:none !important;
            text-shadow:0 1px 0 #fff !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-divider {
            height:2px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,#a71924 0 16%,#111214 16% 74%,#c8aa5b 74%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-tier {
            border:1px solid #9b1720 !important;
            border-radius:1px !important;
            background:#9b1720 !important;
            color:#fff !important;
            letter-spacing:1px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-mission {
            max-width:78% !important;
            color:#333538 !important;
            font-family:Arial,sans-serif !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-source {
            color:#8b711f !important;
            letter-spacing:1.3px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-kicker {
            color:#81151c !important;
            letter-spacing:1.5px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-amount {
            color:#111214 !important;
            text-shadow:0 1px 0 #fff,2px 2px 0 rgba(184,152,66,.32) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-particle {
            border-radius:50% !important;
            background:#e8cb72 !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 7px rgba(238,207,112,.72) !important;
        }

        @keyframes mcmsBondPanelIn {
            0% { opacity:0; transform:translateY(7px) scale(.985); filter:blur(2px) brightness(.72); }
            55% { opacity:1; transform:translateY(-1px) scale(1.002); filter:blur(0) brightness(1.05); }
            100% { opacity:1; transform:none; filter:none; }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsBondWireSweep {
            0% { transform:translateX(-150%); opacity:0; }
            10% { opacity:.9; }
            85% { opacity:.68; }
            100% { transform:translateX(820%); opacity:0; }
        }
        @keyframes mcmsBondGunBarrel {
            from { transform:rotate(-5deg) scale(1.08); }
            to { transform:rotate(355deg) scale(1.08); }
        }

        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before {
            width:112px !important;
            height:36px !important;
            right:92px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before {
            width:72px !important;
            height:25px !important;
            right:57px !important;
            opacity:.68 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label {
            min-width:112px !important;
            padding-left:34px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label::before {
            width:24px !important;
        }

        /*
         * v4.0.1 007 readability and payout-fit refinement.
         * Keep bright active cards dark-on-ivory, while nested status hardware remains
         * gold/ivory-on-black. This prevents black icons and ON chips disappearing.
         */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn.mcms-on .mcms-iconbox,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn.mcms-active .mcms-iconbox,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-place-main.mcms-active .mcms-iconbox {
            border-color:#c8aa5b !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#202328,#08090b) !important;
            color:#f0d47d !important;
            text-shadow:0 0 7px rgba(239,211,127,.30) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08),0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.42) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn.mcms-on .mcms-iconbox *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn.mcms-active .mcms-iconbox *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-place-main.mcms-active .mcms-iconbox * {
            color:#f0d47d !important;
            text-shadow:0 0 7px rgba(239,211,127,.30) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn.mcms-on .mcms-pill,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn.mcms-active .mcms-pill,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-place-main.mcms-active .mcms-pill {
            border-color:#756333 !important;
            background:#111316 !important;
            color:#f2ead7 !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn.mcms-on .mcms-pill *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn.mcms-active .mcms-pill *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-place-main.mcms-active .mcms-pill * {
            color:#f2ead7 !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-row-label,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-check-label,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-note {
            color:#d9d4c9 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-drag-handle {
            padding-right:98px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-drag-handle {
            padding-right:88px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before {
            width:76px !important;
            height:26px !important;
            right:60px !important;
            top:14px !important;
            opacity:.72 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-drag-handle {
            padding-right:66px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before {
            width:55px !important;
            height:20px !important;
            right:51px !important;
            top:10px !important;
            opacity:.62 !important;
        }

        /*
         * Universal payout text safety layer. It runs after every template skin so all
         * headings, mission captions, labels and credit values remain inside the banner.
         */
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-banner {
            max-width:calc(100% - 14px) !important;
            max-height:calc(100% - 14px) !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            container-type:inline-size !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-banner > * {
            position:relative !important;
            z-index:3 !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-title {
            width:100% !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
            overflow-wrap:anywhere !important;
            word-break:normal !important;
            text-wrap:balance !important;
            hyphens:none !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-long {
            font-size:clamp(26px,4.15vw,49px) !important;
            line-height:.94 !important;
            letter-spacing:.45px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-very-long {
            font-size:clamp(21px,3.35vw,39px) !important;
            line-height:.97 !important;
            letter-spacing:.2px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-mission {
            width:100% !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
            overflow:visible !important;
            text-overflow:clip !important;
            overflow-wrap:anywhere !important;
            line-height:1.15 !important;
            text-wrap:balance !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-source,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-kicker,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-amount,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-tier {
            max-width:100% !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
            overflow-wrap:anywhere !important;
            line-height:1.12 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-amount {
            width:100% !important;
            text-align:center !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-compact .mcms-payout-banner {
            padding:20px 22px 18px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-compact .mcms-payout-title {
            font-size:clamp(23px,3.8vw,45px) !important;
            line-height:.96 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-compact .mcms-payout-divider {
            margin-top:7px !important;
            margin-bottom:7px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-tight .mcms-payout-banner {
            padding:16px 16px 14px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-tight .mcms-payout-title {
            font-size:clamp(19px,3.2vw,36px) !important;
            line-height:.98 !important;
            letter-spacing:0 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-tight .mcms-payout-mission {
            font-size:clamp(10px,1.65vw,15px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-tight .mcms-payout-source,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-tight .mcms-payout-kicker {
            font-size:7px !important;
            letter-spacing:.8px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-tight .mcms-payout-amount {
            font-size:clamp(17px,2.6vw,27px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-mission {
            max-width:calc(100% - 8px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            background-position:right 18px top 19px,center !important;
            background-size:clamp(84px,20%,138px) auto,auto !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title {
            padding-inline:clamp(0px,8%,78px) !important;
        }
        @media (max-width:620px) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-banner {
                width:calc(100% - 12px) !important;
                min-width:0 !important;
                padding:20px 14px 18px !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-title {
                font-size:clamp(20px,8vw,38px) !important;
                line-height:.98 !important;
                letter-spacing:.2px !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-long {
                font-size:clamp(18px,7vw,32px) !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-very-long {
                font-size:clamp(16px,6.2vw,28px) !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-mission {
                font-size:clamp(10px,3.6vw,14px) !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-source,
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-kicker {
                font-size:7px !important;
                letter-spacing:.75px !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-banner::before,
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-banner::after {
                max-width:calc(100% - 24px) !important;
                overflow:hidden !important;
                text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
                white-space:nowrap !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
                background-size:82px auto,auto !important;
                background-position:right 10px top 15px,center !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title {
                padding-inline:0 !important;
                padding-top:24px !important;
            }
        }
        @media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce) {
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}.mcms-open,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}::before,
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-a {
                animation:none !important;
            }
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} button,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} button {
                transition:none !important;
            }
        }

        @media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce) {
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-open,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-refreshing .mcms-drawer-refresh,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-no-scene .mcms-critical-state-signal::before,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-no-scene .mcms-critical-state-signal::after,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-enroute .mcms-critical-state-signal,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-assistance .mcms-critical-state,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-clearing .mcms-critical-state::after,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-clearing .mcms-critical-state-signal,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-critical-state-clearing,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-critical-state-clearing::before,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-critical-state-clearing::after,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-clearing,
            #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}::before,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label::before { animation:none !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-special-event,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-zoom,
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-open { transition:none !important; }
        }



        /*
         * v4.1.0 Mission Age Watch integrity overhaul.
         * Final semantic/layout layer: ownership and category are separate facets,
         * status filters are non-contradictory, unknown data remains neutral, and the
         * progressively-rendered list stays readable across every interface theme.
         */
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-refreshed {
            display:flex !important;
            flex-wrap:wrap !important;
            gap:3px 8px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filters,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filters {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:auto repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
            gap:4px !important;
            margin-top:5px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filters {
            grid-template-columns:auto repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-label {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:center !important;
            min-width:46px !important;
            padding:0 4px !important;
            color:#a9bfd0 !important;
            font:950 5.8px/1.05 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.35px !important;
            text-align:center !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter {
            position:relative !important;
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:27px !important;
            gap:5px !important;
            padding:4px 7px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18) !important;
            border-radius:6px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.055) !important;
            color:#eaf4fb !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter span,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter strong { font-weight:950 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter span { overflow:hidden !important; font-size:7px !important; text-overflow:ellipsis !important; text-transform:uppercase !important; white-space:nowrap !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter strong { font-size:10px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter i { position:absolute !important; top:2px !important; right:3px !important; font:900 4.6px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important; opacity:.5 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter.mcms-filter-active { transform:translateY(-1px) !important; box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px currentColor,0 0 12px rgba(0,0,0,.32) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter.mcms-filter-active i { padding:2px 3px !important; border-radius:3px !important; background:currentColor !important; color:#10151b !important; opacity:1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-ownership-all { color:#dbe8f1 !important; border-color:rgba(219,232,241,.55) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-ownership-personal { color:#ffe084 !important; border-color:rgba(255,205,78,.72) !important; background:rgba(66,48,4,.42) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-ownership-alliance { color:#8ed1ff !important; border-color:rgba(79,174,255,.82) !important; background:rgba(4,38,68,.50) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-category-all { color:#dbe8f1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-category-standard { color:#b7c8d5 !important; border-color:rgba(183,200,213,.62) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-category-event { color:#e5b5ff !important; border-color:rgba(202,126,255,.78) !important; background:rgba(54,17,78,.48) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-category-special { color:#ff9fe8 !important; border-color:rgba(255,74,204,.82) !important; background:rgba(80,8,63,.54) !important; }

        /* v4.1.1: keep Sort and Distance Origin controls on distinct rows so
           labels cannot collide in expanded, tablet or narrower desktop layouts. */
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-controls {
            grid-template-columns:auto repeat(3,minmax(50px,1fr)) !important;
            grid-auto-rows:minmax(21px,auto) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-button span {
            display:block !important;
            width:100% !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
            text-align:center !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-origin-control {
            grid-column:1 / 4 !important;
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:auto minmax(0,1fr) !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            gap:4px !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            padding:2px 4px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(82,178,240,.42) !important;
            border-radius:5px !important;
            background:rgba(4,27,43,.62) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-origin-control span { color:#8fd4ff !important; font:950 5px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important; letter-spacing:.3px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-origin-control select { min-width:0 !important; width:100% !important; height:19px !important; padding:0 3px !important; border:0 !important; background:#111820 !important; color:#eef8ff !important; font:850 6.6px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-lock-origin { grid-column:4 / 5 !important; min-width:48px !important; padding:3px 5px !important; border:1px solid rgba(82,178,240,.55) !important; border-radius:5px !important; background:rgba(7,46,72,.74) !important; color:#a8ddff !important; font:950 5.8px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important; cursor:pointer !important; white-space:nowrap !important; }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values { grid-template-columns:auto auto minmax(0,1fr) auto auto !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-mode { display:flex !important; gap:2px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-mode button { min-width:38px !important; padding:3px 5px !important; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25) !important; border-radius:4px !important; background:rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important; color:#dceaf3 !important; font:950 5.8px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important; cursor:pointer !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-mode button.mcms-filter-active { border-color:#f0d47d !important; background:#f0d47d !important; color:#171717 !important; box-shadow:0 0 7px rgba(240,212,125,.35) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card small { display:block !important; margin-top:1px !important; font-size:4.8px !important; line-height:1 !important; opacity:.7 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-showing { color:#b9cbd8 !important; font:900 5px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important; letter-spacing:.25px !important; white-space:nowrap !important; }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary { grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-on-scene { border-color:rgba(61,209,126,.68) !important; color:#9ef0bd !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-my-units { border-color:rgba(232,214,154,.62) !important; color:#f3e4ad !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-syncing { border-color:rgba(151,176,194,.62) !important; color:#c9d8e2 !important; background:repeating-linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(95,116,132,.14) 0 7px,rgba(95,116,132,.04) 7px 14px) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary-card small { display:block !important; margin-top:2px !important; font-size:5px !important; opacity:.76 !important; text-transform:uppercase !important; }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-badge,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-eligibility,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-data-badge {
            display:inline-flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            min-height:15px !important;
            padding:2px 5px !important;
            border:1px solid currentColor !important;
            border-radius:999px !important;
            font:950 5.7px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.22px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-badge.mcms-category-standard { color:#bac8d2 !important; background:rgba(74,88,99,.42) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-badge.mcms-category-event { color:#e5b5ff !important; background:rgba(76,25,104,.64) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-badge.mcms-category-special { color:#ff9fe8 !important; background:rgba(110,12,83,.72) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-eligibility.mcms-eligible { color:#93efb4 !important; background:rgba(5,89,43,.72) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-eligibility.mcms-not-eligible { color:#ffd47b !important; background:rgba(91,57,2,.74) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-data-badge.mcms-data-sync { color:#d8e6ee !important; background:rgba(68,88,102,.82) !important; animation:mcmsCriticalSyncPulse 1.4s ease-in-out infinite !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-data-badge.mcms-data-unknown { color:#d5dce1 !important; background:rgba(63,68,73,.72) !important; }
        @keyframes mcmsCriticalSyncPulse { 50% { filter:brightness(1.45); box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(173,207,230,.38); } }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-live-markers { display:flex !important; flex-wrap:wrap !important; justify-content:flex-end !important; gap:4px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-prisoners { display:inline-flex !important; align-items:center !important; gap:3px !important; min-height:20px !important; padding:3px 7px !important; border:1px solid rgba(255,159,67,.82) !important; border-radius:999px !important; background:rgba(92,41,5,.82) !important; color:#ffd0a5 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-prisoners strong { font-size:9px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-prisoners small { font-size:5.4px !important; font-weight:950 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-unit-extras { display:flex !important; flex-wrap:wrap !important; gap:3px !important; grid-column:1 / -1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-unit-extra { display:inline-flex !important; align-items:center !important; gap:3px !important; padding:2px 5px !important; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22) !important; border-radius:999px !important; background:rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important; font-size:5.2px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-unit-extra strong { font-size:7px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-unit-transporting { color:#ffc47a !important; border-color:rgba(255,153,40,.68) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-unit-awaiting { color:#ffe18b !important; border-color:rgba(255,212,82,.68) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-unit-oos { color:#d4dbe0 !important; border-color:rgba(172,186,196,.55) !important; }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row.mcms-critical-state-syncing {
            border-color:rgba(146,170,188,.74) !important;
            background:repeating-linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(71,89,102,.42) 0 11px,rgba(42,54,63,.42) 11px 22px) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-syncing .mcms-critical-state { border-color:rgba(167,193,211,.70) !important; background:rgba(44,60,72,.82) !important; color:#e2eef5 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-syncing .mcms-critical-state-signal { border:2px solid rgba(220,236,246,.86) !important; border-right-color:transparent !important; border-radius:50% !important; animation:mcms-critical-refresh-spin .8s linear infinite !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-age-unknown .mcms-critical-age-band { color:#c7d2da !important; }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row { content-visibility:auto !important; contain-intrinsic-size:112px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-list-footer { display:flex !important; align-items:center !important; justify-content:space-between !important; gap:8px !important; padding:7px !important; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14) !important; border-radius:7px !important; background:rgba(12,18,23,.88) !important; color:#c9d8e2 !important; font-size:7px !important; font-weight:900 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-list-footer button { padding:5px 9px !important; border:1px solid rgba(87,183,244,.72) !important; border-radius:5px !important; background:rgba(5,61,96,.88) !important; color:#d9f2ff !important; font:950 7px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important; cursor:pointer !important; }

        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filters,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filters { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-label,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-label { grid-column:1 / -1 !important; min-height:18px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-controls { grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-sort-label,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-origin-control { grid-column:1 / -1 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-lock-origin { grid-column:1 / -1 !important; min-height:28px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values { grid-template-columns:auto minmax(0,1fr) auto !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-mode { grid-column:2 / 3 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-grid { grid-column:1 / -1 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-showing { grid-column:1 / 3 !important; }

        /* v4.3.2: compact Mission Age Watch View Controls submenu. */
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-header-controls {
            position:relative !important;
            display:block !important;
            width:100% !important;
            max-width:278px !important;
            margin-top:5px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-trigger {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            grid-template-areas:"label chevron" "summary chevron" !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            width:100% !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:36px !important;
            gap:2px 8px !important;
            padding:6px 9px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(83,183,242,.62) !important;
            border-radius:7px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(8,48,74,.82),rgba(10,22,31,.92)) !important;
            color:#eaf7ff !important;
            text-align:left !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.035),0 5px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.18) !important;
            transition:filter 120ms ease,transform 120ms ease,box-shadow 120ms ease !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-trigger:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-trigger:focus-visible,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-header-controls.mcms-open .mcms-critical-view-trigger {
            filter:brightness(1.13) !important;
            transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
            outline:2px solid #83d8ff !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08),0 0 14px rgba(72,188,255,.22) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-trigger-label {
            grid-area:label !important;
            color:#8fd4ff !important;
            font:950 6.2px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.58px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-trigger strong {
            grid-area:summary !important;
            display:block !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            color:#f4f8fb !important;
            font:950 7.5px/1.1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.18px !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-chevron {
            grid-area:chevron !important;
            display:grid !important;
            place-items:center !important;
            width:23px !important;
            height:23px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(143,212,255,.46) !important;
            border-radius:6px !important;
            background:rgba(0,0,0,.22) !important;
            color:#a9e3ff !important;
            font:950 14px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            transition:transform 140ms ease !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-header-controls.mcms-open .mcms-critical-view-chevron {
            transform:rotate(180deg) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu[hidden] { display:none !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu {
            display:block !important;
            width:100% !important;
            margin-top:5px !important;
            padding:7px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(83,183,242,.58) !important;
            border-radius:8px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(155deg,rgba(9,25,35,.98),rgba(5,14,21,.985)) !important;
            box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.44),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.035) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu-head {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            justify-content:space-between !important;
            gap:8px !important;
            min-height:27px !important;
            padding:0 0 6px !important;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu-head > span {
            display:grid !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            gap:2px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu-head strong {
            color:#f0f8fc !important;
            font:950 7.2px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.55px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu-head small {
            color:#9eb3c1 !important;
            font:800 5.6px/1.1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu-head button {
            min-width:42px !important;
            min-height:23px !important;
            padding:4px 7px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(143,212,255,.55) !important;
            border-radius:5px !important;
            background:rgba(7,53,80,.78) !important;
            color:#c9edff !important;
            font:950 5.8px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu .mcms-critical-age-filters,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu .mcms-critical-sort-controls {
            width:100% !important;
            max-width:none !important;
            margin-top:6px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-drawer-header-controls {
            display:block !important;
            width:min(100%,360px) !important;
            max-width:360px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-critical-view-menu .mcms-critical-age-filters,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-critical-expanded .mcms-critical-view-menu .mcms-critical-sort-controls {
            width:100% !important;
            max-width:none !important;
            margin-top:6px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-header-controls {
            max-width:360px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-trigger {
            min-height:44px !important;
            padding:7px 10px !important;
            border-radius:10px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-trigger-label { font-size:7px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-trigger strong { font-size:8.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu { padding:9px !important; border-radius:10px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-header-controls {
            max-width:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-trigger {
            min-height:42px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu .mcms-critical-age-filters {
            grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu .mcms-critical-age-label {
            grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
            justify-content:flex-start !important;
            min-height:14px !important;
            padding-left:1px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu .mcms-critical-sort-controls {
            grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu .mcms-critical-sort-label,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu .mcms-critical-origin-control,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu .mcms-critical-lock-origin {
            grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
        }

        @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
            #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-data-badge.mcms-data-sync,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-syncing .mcms-critical-state-signal { animation:none !important; }
        }



        /*
         * v4.3.0 Umbrella Containment asset layer.
         * Hosted artwork is decorative, pointer-free and intentionally excluded
         * from protected operational state colours.
         */
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-umbrella {
            border-color:#8f172d !important;
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,rgba(216,25,63,.22),transparent 72%),
                linear-gradient(145deg,#222832,#090c11) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.12),0 0 12px rgba(216,25,63,.24) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-umbrella::before {
            content:"" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            inset:4px !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaEmblem}") center/contain no-repeat !important;
            opacity:1 !important;
            filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.48)) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-umbrella::after {
            content:"BSL-4" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            right:3px !important;
            bottom:2px !important;
            color:#fff !important;
            font:950 4.8px/1 Consolas,monospace !important;
            letter-spacing:.45px !important;
            text-shadow:0 1px 2px #000 !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn {
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaEmblem}") center/74% auto no-repeat,
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 48%,rgba(216,25,63,.13),transparent 72%),
                linear-gradient(180deg,#23272f,#0b0e13) !important;
