            color:transparent !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn:focus-visible {
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaEmblem}") center/74% auto no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#dfe4e8) !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} {
            background:
                linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(6,13,8,.86),rgba(4,9,6,.95)),
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaFacilitySchematic}") center 92px/96% auto no-repeat,
                repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,.026) 0 1px,transparent 1px 4px),
                radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 18%,rgba(200,16,46,.12),transparent 58%),
                linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(12,23,14,.992),rgba(5,12,7,.992)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header {
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaEmblem}") right 92px center/48px auto no-repeat,
                repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(216,25,63,.025) 0 1px,transparent 1px 16px),
                linear-gradient(180deg,#262a31,#14171d) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before {
            left:138px !important;
            right:auto !important;
            max-width:calc(100% - 246px) !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label {
            position:relative !important;
            padding-right:29px !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label::after {
            content:"" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            right:6px !important;
            top:50% !important;
            width:19px !important;
            height:19px !important;
            transform:translateY(-50%) !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaContainmentBadge}") center/contain no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.72 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
            filter:drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(216,25,63,.28)) !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel[data-panel="resources"],
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel[data-panel="ops"] {
            position:relative !important;
            isolation:isolate !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel[data-panel="resources"]::after,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel[data-panel="ops"]::after {
            content:"" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            right:-7px !important;
            bottom:8px !important;
            width:118px !important;
            height:190px !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaSpecimenVial}") center bottom/contain no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.075 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
            z-index:0 !important;
            filter:grayscale(.12) drop-shadow(0 8px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.35)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel[data-panel="ops"]::after {
            right:4px !important;
            bottom:12px !important;
            width:178px !important;
            height:110px !important;
            background-image:url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaSurveillanceTerminal}") !important;
            opacity:.065 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel[data-panel="resources"] > *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel[data-panel="ops"] > * {
            position:relative !important;
            z-index:1 !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-head {
            position:relative !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            isolation:isolate !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head::after,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-head::after {
            content:"" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            right:84px !important;
            top:50% !important;
            width:64px !important;
            height:64px !important;
            transform:translateY(-50%) !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaContainmentBadge}") center/contain no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.11 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
            z-index:0 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-head::after {
            right:78px !important;
            width:116px !important;
            height:70px !important;
            background-image:url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaSurveillanceTerminal}") !important;
            opacity:.095 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head > *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vcs-head > * {
            position:relative !important;
            z-index:1 !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label {
            padding-left:40px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label::before {
            content:"" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            left:7px !important;
            top:50% !important;
            width:27px !important;
            height:27px !important;
            transform:translateY(-50%) !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaEmblem}") center/contain no-repeat !important;
            border:0 !important;
            box-shadow:none !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-window {
            border-color:rgba(216,25,63,.64) !important;
            background:#070b0d !important;
            box-shadow:0 28px 90px rgba(0,0,0,.78),inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.05),0 0 34px rgba(216,25,63,.12) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-toolbar {
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaFacilitySchematic}") right center/420px auto no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(180deg,#252a31,#101319) !important;
            border-bottom-color:#9e1830 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-brand-icon {
            font-size:0 !important;
            border-color:#8f172d !important;
            border-radius:50% !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaEmblem}") center/84% auto no-repeat,
                #10141a !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(216,25,63,.23) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-address-lock { color:#ff5168 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-progress::before { background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8102e,#fff,#c8102e,transparent) !important; }

        /* Umbrella Containment payout package. */
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-red {
            background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 0% 50%,rgba(215,18,50,.76),rgba(110,5,24,.32) 34%,transparent 68%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-blue {
            background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 100% 50%,rgba(236,241,244,.36),rgba(100,111,119,.15) 34%,transparent 68%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-cinematic {
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,transparent 0 14%,rgba(3,8,7,.30) 58%,rgba(0,2,2,.94) 100%),
                linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(200,16,46,.11),transparent 36%,rgba(236,242,244,.055)) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-a {
            background:
                linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(3,10,8,.42),rgba(3,8,7,.68)),
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaFacilitySchematic}") center/cover no-repeat,
                repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(91,235,158,.022) 0 1px,transparent 1px 5px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaEmblem}") center/340px auto no-repeat,
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,rgba(200,16,46,.16),transparent 34%),
                repeating-conic-gradient(from 0deg at 50% 50%,transparent 0 29deg,rgba(235,241,244,.025) 29deg 30deg,transparent 30deg 59deg,rgba(204,24,48,.035) 59deg 60deg) !important;
            filter:drop-shadow(0 0 26px rgba(200,16,46,.18)) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-c {
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaPayoutSeal}") center 82%/min(68%,720px) auto no-repeat,
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaSurveillanceTerminal}") 8% 18%/min(29%,330px) auto no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(135deg,transparent 0 48%,rgba(208,35,47,.055) 48% 48.5%,transparent 48.5% 51.5%,rgba(226,235,238,.045) 51.5% 52%,transparent 52%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            width:min(820px,calc(100% - 28px)) !important;
            padding:34px 46px 27px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(231,237,240,.58) !important;
            border-left:9px solid #c8102e !important;
            border-right:4px solid #68727a !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(108deg,rgba(5,8,10,.54),rgba(22,28,31,.68) 24%,rgba(27,32,36,.72) 52%,rgba(20,25,28,.66) 76%,rgba(4,7,9,.52)),
                repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,.018) 0 1px,transparent 1px 5px) !important;
            clip-path:polygon(0 0,95% 0,100% 17px,100% 100%,5% 100%,0 calc(100% - 17px)) !important;
            box-shadow:0 31px 78px rgba(0,0,0,.70),-17px 0 42px rgba(200,16,46,.18),17px 0 34px rgba(226,235,238,.07),inset 0 0 42px rgba(200,16,46,.025) !important;
            backdrop-filter:blur(.8px) saturate(1.08) !important;
            -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(.8px) saturate(1.08) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-banner::before {
            content:"UMBRELLA CONTAINMENT // BSL-4 SECURE NODE" !important;
            left:24px !important;
            right:24px !important;
            top:11px !important;
            max-width:calc(100% - 48px) !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
            color:rgba(255,123,142,.78) !important;
            font:950 7px/1 Consolas,monospace !important;
            letter-spacing:1.15px !important;
            text-align:center !important;
            z-index:2 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-banner::after {
            content:"" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            inset:0 !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaEmblem}") right 18px center/126px auto no-repeat,
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.umbrellaSpecimenVial}") left 18px bottom -52px/88px auto no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.085 !important;
            z-index:1 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-title {
            width:100% !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
            padding-inline:clamp(0px,3.5vw,34px) !important;
            color:#f4f7f8 !important;
            font-family:"Arial Narrow","Roboto Condensed",Arial,sans-serif !important;
            font-size:clamp(31px,4.55vw,54px) !important;
            line-height:.94 !important;
            font-weight:950 !important;
            letter-spacing:1.35px !important;
            transform:scaleX(.97) !important;
            text-shadow:3px 3px 0 rgba(5,8,10,.92),5px 5px 0 rgba(200,16,46,.42),0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,.12) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-long {
            font-size:clamp(27px,3.85vw,46px) !important;
            line-height:.96 !important;
            letter-spacing:.85px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-very-long {
            font-size:clamp(23px,3.25vw,39px) !important;
            line-height:.98 !important;
            letter-spacing:.45px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-mission {
            max-width:min(690px,100%) !important;
            max-height:2.35em !important;
            margin:8px auto 0 !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            font-size:clamp(11px,1.55vw,16px) !important;
            line-height:1.16 !important;
            text-shadow:0 2px 9px rgba(0,0,0,.95),0 0 12px rgba(0,0,0,.72) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-divider {
            width:min(440px,82%) !important;
            height:3px !important;
            margin:10px auto 8px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8102e 13%,#f0f4f5 48%,#68727a 84%,transparent) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-tier {
            margin-bottom:8px !important;
            border-radius:2px !important;
            border-color:#d82b47 !important;
            color:#fff !important;
            background:rgba(73,5,20,.64) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 4px 0 0 #dfe6e9 !important;
            letter-spacing:1.25px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-source {
            color:#f0f4f5 !important;
            font-size:7.5px !important;
            letter-spacing:1.45px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-kicker {
            color:#ff7b90 !important;
            font-size:clamp(8px,1.15vw,10px) !important;
            line-height:1.12 !important;
            letter-spacing:clamp(1.2px,.24vw,2.4px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-amount {
            margin-top:6px !important;
            color:#fff !important;
            font-size:clamp(19px,2.7vw,30px) !important;
            line-height:1.05 !important;
            letter-spacing:.75px !important;
            font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums !important;
            text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(255,255,255,.28),3px 3px 0 rgba(200,16,46,.62),0 0 30px rgba(200,16,46,.20) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-compact[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            padding:29px 30px 22px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-compact[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-title {
            font-size:clamp(24px,3.45vw,41px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-tight[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            padding:26px 22px 19px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-tight[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-title {
            font-size:clamp(20px,2.95vw,34px) !important;
            letter-spacing:.25px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-fit-tight[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-kicker {
            font-size:7px !important;
            letter-spacing:.9px !important;
        }

        @media (max-width:760px) {
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header {
                background:
                    repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(216,25,63,.025) 0 1px,transparent 1px 16px),
                    linear-gradient(180deg,#262a31,#14171d) !important;
            }
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before { display:none !important; }
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel[data-panel="resources"]::after,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel[data-panel="ops"]::after { opacity:.045 !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-banner { padding:30px 18px 21px !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-title { padding-inline:0 !important; font-size:clamp(24px,7.4vw,40px) !important; letter-spacing:.65px !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-long { font-size:clamp(21px,6.5vw,34px) !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-very-long { font-size:clamp(18px,5.6vw,29px) !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-mission { font-size:clamp(10px,3.3vw,14px) !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-kicker { font-size:7px !important; letter-spacing:1px !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-banner::after { opacity:.06 !important; background-size:88px auto,62px auto !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="biohazard"] .mcms-payout-banner::before { left:16px !important; right:16px !important; max-width:calc(100% - 32px) !important; font-size:6px !important; letter-spacing:.65px !important; }
        }
        @media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce) {
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::after,
            html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn.mcms-on { animation:none !important; }
        }

        /* v4.2.0 searchable Help Centre and browser-style guide viewer. */
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button {
            font-weight:950 !important;
            color:#bcecff !important;
            border-color:rgba(87,194,245,.36) !important;
            background:rgba(28,93,124,.24) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button::after { content:'' !important; }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button {
            border:1px solid var(--mcms-cp-ink) !important; border-radius:0 !important;
            background:var(--mcms-cp-ink) !important; color:var(--mcms-cp-yellow) !important;
            clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 6px) 0,100% 6px,100% 100%,0 100%) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="cyberpunk"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button:focus-visible { background:var(--mcms-cp-cyan) !important; color:#071019 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button {
            border:1px solid #698252 !important; border-radius:4px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#1f2d1f,#0d160f) !important; color:var(--mcms-fo-green-strong) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 1px rgba(221,255,198,.08) !important; text-shadow:0 0 4px rgba(185,255,114,.34) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="fallout4"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button:focus-visible { border-color:var(--mcms-fo-green-strong) !important; background:var(--mcms-fo-green-strong) !important; color:var(--mcms-fo-ink) !important; text-shadow:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button {
            border:1px solid #727984 !important; border-radius:4px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#23272e,#0d1015) !important; color:var(--mcms-um-white-strong) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="umbrella"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button:focus-visible { border-color:#f24b59 !important; background:#7f111d !important; color:#fff !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button {
            border:1px solid #65685f !important; border-radius:2px !important; background:#20221f !important; color:#e7d1a1 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="factorio"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button:focus-visible { border-color:#ec9743 !important; background:#df842f !important; color:var(--mcms-fac-ink) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button {
            border:1px solid #8f7a3f !important; border-radius:2px !important; background:#111316 !important; color:#f0d47f !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-help-button:focus-visible { border-color:#d5b85f !important; background:#292313 !important; color:#fff0b6 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before { right:90px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before { right:108px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before { right:101px !important; }

        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} {
            display:none !important; position:fixed !important; inset:0 !important; z-index:2147483600 !important;
            align-items:center !important; justify-content:center !important; padding:18px !important;
            background:rgba(0,6,10,.72) !important; backdrop-filter:blur(9px) !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(9px) !important;
            pointer-events:auto !important; font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId}.mcms-open { display:flex !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId}, #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} * { box-sizing:border-box !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-window {
            width:min(1500px,100%) !important; height:min(940px,calc(100vh - 36px)) !important; min-height:420px !important;
            display:flex !important; flex-direction:column !important; overflow:hidden !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(92,190,232,.42) !important; border-radius:16px !important;
            background:#071018 !important; box-shadow:0 28px 90px rgba(0,0,0,.72),inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.05) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-toolbar {
            min-height:56px !important; display:grid !important; grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important; align-items:center !important; gap:12px !important;
            padding:8px 10px 8px 14px !important; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(93,175,212,.25) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#102532,#091720) !important; color:#edf8ff !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-brand { min-width:0 !important; display:flex !important; align-items:center !important; gap:10px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-brand-icon {
            width:36px !important; height:36px !important; flex:0 0 36px !important; display:grid !important; place-items:center !important;
            border:1px solid #4aa7cf !important; border-radius:11px !important; background:#0b2c3d !important; color:#bfeeff !important;
            font-size:20px !important; font-weight:1000 !important; box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(79,195,247,.14) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-brand-copy { min-width:0 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-brand-copy strong { display:block !important; overflow:hidden !important; text-overflow:ellipsis !important; white-space:nowrap !important; font-size:13px !important; font-weight:950 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-brand-copy small { display:block !important; margin-top:2px !important; color:#8eabb9 !important; font-size:9px !important; font-weight:750 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-actions { display:flex !important; gap:6px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-action {
            min-width:38px !important; height:38px !important; padding:0 10px !important; border:1px solid #31596d !important; border-radius:10px !important;
            background:#0c202b !important; color:#dff5ff !important; cursor:pointer !important; font-size:12px !important; font-weight:900 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-action:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-action:focus-visible { border-color:#62cfff !important; background:#15435a !important; outline:none !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-close { font-size:20px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-address {
            min-height:35px !important; display:grid !important; grid-template-columns:auto minmax(0,1fr) auto !important; gap:8px !important; align-items:center !important;
            padding:5px 12px !important; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(67,121,146,.22) !important; background:#07131b !important;
            color:#88a9b9 !important; font-size:9px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-address-lock { color:#69d99b !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-address-text { overflow:hidden !important; text-overflow:ellipsis !important; white-space:nowrap !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-status { color:#b8d7e6 !important; font-weight:850 !important; white-space:nowrap !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-progress { height:2px !important; background:transparent !important; overflow:hidden !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId}.mcms-loading .mcms-help-progress::before {
            content:'' !important; display:block !important; width:34% !important; height:100% !important; background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#4fc3f7,#a8e7ff,transparent) !important;
            animation:mcmsHelpProgress 1.05s ease-in-out infinite !important;
        }
        @keyframes mcmsHelpProgress { from { transform:translateX(-120%) } to { transform:translateX(400%) } }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-content { position:relative !important; flex:1 1 auto !important; min-height:0 !important; background:#071018 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-frame { width:100% !important; height:100% !important; display:block !important; border:0 !important; background:#071018 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-fallback {
            position:absolute !important; inset:0 !important; display:none !important; place-items:center !important; padding:24px !important;
            background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 20%,rgba(79,195,247,.10),transparent 34rem),#071018 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId}.mcms-error .mcms-help-fallback { display:grid !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId}.mcms-error .mcms-help-frame { visibility:hidden !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-error-card {
            width:min(520px,100%) !important; padding:24px !important; border:1px solid rgba(96,184,224,.32) !important; border-radius:16px !important;
            background:#0d1f2a !important; color:#eaf6fb !important; text-align:center !important; box-shadow:0 18px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.40) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-error-card strong { display:block !important; font-size:18px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-error-card p { margin:9px 0 16px !important; color:#9db5c1 !important; font-size:11px !important; line-height:1.45 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-error-actions { display:flex !important; justify-content:center !important; flex-wrap:wrap !important; gap:8px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-error-actions button { min-height:38px !important; padding:0 14px !important; border:1px solid #4286a5 !important; border-radius:9px !important; background:#12384b !important; color:#fff !important; cursor:pointer !important; font-size:11px !important; font-weight:900 !important; }
        @media (max-width:760px) {
            #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} { padding:0 !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-window { width:100% !important; height:100% !important; min-height:100% !important; border:0 !important; border-radius:0 !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-toolbar { min-height:58px !important; padding-top:calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-top)) !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-brand-copy small { display:none !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-action { min-width:40px !important; width:40px !important; padding:0 !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-source { display:none !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-address { padding-left:8px !important; padding-right:8px !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} .mcms-help-address-text { font-size:8px !important; }
        }
        @media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce) {
            #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId}.mcms-loading .mcms-help-progress::before { animation:none !important; width:100% !important; }
        }

        /* v4.4.2 Tablet command-panel stacking and cohesive sticky navigation.
           The header and tab strip now move as one sticky unit, preventing the
           tabs from detaching and preventing Mission Age Watch from covering
           the open Tablet Command Panel. */
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-panel-sticky-stack {
            position:relative !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}.mcms-open {
            z-index:1040 !important;
            isolation:isolate !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}.mcms-open {
            z-index:1035 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-panel-sticky-stack {
            position:sticky !important;
            top:-12px !important;
            z-index:24 !important;
            margin:-12px -12px 12px !important;
            padding:0 12px !important;
            background:rgba(8,12,18,.995) !important;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13) !important;
            box-shadow:0 8px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.24) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-panel-sticky-stack .mcms-header {
            position:relative !important;
            top:auto !important;
            z-index:2 !important;
            margin:0 -12px !important;
            padding:10px 12px 9px !important;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-panel-sticky-stack .mcms-tabs {
            position:relative !important;
            top:auto !important;
            z-index:1 !important;
            margin:0 -4px !important;
            padding:8px 4px 10px !important;
        }


        /* v4.7.0 Economy Mode: reversible low-overhead rendering and native map workload controls. */
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-launch-row {
            display:inline-flex !important; align-items:stretch !important; gap:5px !important; width:auto !important;
            pointer-events:auto !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-economy-btn {
            width:40px !important; height:48px !important; padding:0 !important; border:1px solid rgba(142,210,120,.42) !important;
            border-radius:10px !important; background:rgba(10,20,12,.86) !important; color:#c8efbd !important;
            display:flex !important; flex-direction:column !important; align-items:center !important; justify-content:center !important; gap:2px !important;
            cursor:pointer !important; box-shadow:0 5px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.28) !important; backdrop-filter:blur(5px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-economy-btn > span { font-size:18px !important; line-height:1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-economy-btn > small { font-size:7px !important; line-height:1 !important; font-weight:950 !important; letter-spacing:.5px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-economy-btn:hover,
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-economy-btn:focus-visible { background:rgba(43,92,38,.88) !important; color:#fff !important; border-color:#9ee58a !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-economy-btn.mcms-on {
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#2f8f45,#176329) !important; color:#fff !important; border-color:#b9f5a7 !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(155,235,130,.17),0 5px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.25) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} { grid-template-columns:109px minmax(0,1fr) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-launch-row { grid-area:menu !important; width:109px !important; gap:5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-shell { grid-area:auto !important; width:52px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-economy-btn { width:52px !important; height:48px !important; border-radius:13px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-command-bar-open="false"][data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} {
            width:109px !important; max-width:109px !important; grid-template-columns:109px !important; grid-template-areas:"menu" !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-launch-row { display:contents !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-economy-btn {
            width:auto !important; min-width:0 !important; height:var(--mcms-mobile-filter-height,44px) !important; border-radius:10px !important; pointer-events:auto !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-command-bar-open="false"][data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} {
            width:104px !important; max-width:104px !important; grid-template-columns:50px 50px !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-tile-pane img.leaflet-tile { filter:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-fade-anim .leaflet-tile,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-zoom-animated,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-marker-icon,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-marker-shadow { transition:none !important; will-change:auto !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-tile-pane,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-marker-pane { will-change:auto !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} * {
            animation:none !important; transition:none !important; backdrop-filter:none !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} {
            backdrop-filter:none !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter:none !important; box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.28) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} button,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} button,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-card,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-card,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} button,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} * { box-shadow:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}::before,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}::after,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}::before,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}::after,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}::before { animation:none !important; display:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-track {
            animation:none !important; transform:none !important; will-change:auto !important; width:100% !important; min-width:100% !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-group { width:100% !important; justify-content:center !important; padding-right:0 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-group:nth-child(n+2) { display:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-marker-icon.mcms-marker-mission,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .mcms-mission-spawn-focus,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .mcms-mission-spawn-ring,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .mcms-mission-spawn-label,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .mcms-resource-gap-badge,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .mcms-transport-watcher-badge,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .mcms-stuck-mission-badge { animation:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-theme-fx,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-theme-particles,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-particles,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-bc-embers,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-vc-grid,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-bc-hud { display:none !important; animation:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.toastId} { animation:none !important; transition:none !important; backdrop-filter:none !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row {
            content-visibility:auto !important; contain:layout paint style !important; contain-intrinsic-size:0 145px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #mission_list .missionSideBarEntry,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #mission_list [id^="mission_"],
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #radio_messages li,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #radio_messages_important li {
            content-visibility:auto !important; contain-intrinsic-size:0 58px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .progress-bar-striped.active,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .progress.active .progress-bar { animation:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-map-moving="true"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-map-moving="true"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} { visibility:hidden !important; }

        /* v4.8.0 Maximum Economy Mode: stop decorative compositing and minimise live map paint. */
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.toastId} {
            filter:none !important; text-shadow:none !important; mix-blend-mode:normal !important; isolation:auto !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} *::before,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} *::after,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} *::before,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} *::after,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} *::before,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} *::after,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.toastId} {
            animation:none !important; transition:none !important; filter:none !important;
            backdrop-filter:none !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter:none !important;
            box-shadow:none !important; text-shadow:none !important; will-change:auto !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-economy-btn,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-shell {
            background-image:none !important; backdrop-filter:none !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel.mcms-active,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-body {
            contain:layout paint style !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-container *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #mission_list *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #radio_messages *,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #radio_messages_important * {
            animation:none !important; transition:none !important; will-change:auto !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-marker-shadow { display:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-marker-icon,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-tooltip,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-popup-content-wrapper,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] .leaflet-popup-tip,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #mission_list .missionSideBarEntry,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #radio_messages li,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #radio_messages_important li {
            filter:none !important; box-shadow:none !important; text-shadow:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-red,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-blue,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} .mcms-payout-cinematic,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} [class*="mcms-payout-theme-fx"],
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} [class*="mcms-payout-particle"],
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} [class*="mcms-payout-bc-"],
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId} [class*="mcms-payout-vc-"] {
            display:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-map-moving="true"] .leaflet-marker-pane,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-map-moving="true"] .leaflet-shadow-pane,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-map-moving="true"] .leaflet-tooltip-pane,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-map-moving="true"] .leaflet-popup-pane,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-map-moving="true"] .leaflet-overlay-pane,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-map-moving="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-map-moving="true"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-map-moving="true"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} {
            visibility:hidden !important;
        }

        /* v4.8.0 full quality audit: sizing, readability, responsive flow and focus integrity. */
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} *, #${SCRIPT.panelId} *, #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} *, #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} *,
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} *, #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} *, #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} * { box-sizing:border-box !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-grid-2,.mcms-row,.mcms-ui-theme-grid,.mcms-profile-row,.mcms-bookmark-row,.mcms-quick-row,.mcms-finance-vault-summary) > *,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(.mcms-critical-values-grid,.mcms-critical-type-filters,.mcms-critical-category-filters,.mcms-critical-summary,.mcms-critical-unit-grid) > * { min-width:0 !important; max-width:100% !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-status,.mcms-footer,.mcms-subtitle,.mcms-row-label,.mcms-profile-main,.mcms-bookmark-name,.mcms-ui-theme-copy,.mcms-text),
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(.mcms-critical-state-copy,.mcms-critical-location,.mcms-critical-meta,.mcms-critical-list-footer),
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} :is(.mcms-vehicle-status-title,.mcms-vehicle-status-body) { overflow-wrap:anywhere !important; word-break:normal !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId}, #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}, #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}, #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} { overscroll-behavior:contain !important; scrollbar-gutter:stable both-edges; }
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} :is(button,[tabindex]), #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(button,input,select,[tabindex]),
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(button,input,select,[tabindex]), #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} :is(button,input,select,[tabindex]),
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} :is(button,input,select,a,[tabindex]) { outline:none !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} :is(button,[tabindex]):focus-visible, #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(button,input,select,[tabindex]):focus-visible,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(button,input,select,[tabindex]):focus-visible, #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} :is(button,input,select,[tabindex]):focus-visible,
        #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId} :is(button,input,select,a,[tabindex]):focus-visible { outline:3px solid #8cddff !important; outline-offset:2px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(button,input,select):disabled, #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(button,input,select):disabled,
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} :is(button,input,select):disabled { opacity:.55 !important; cursor:not-allowed !important; }

        html:not([data-mcms-tablet-active="true"]):not([data-mcms-mobile-active="true"]) #${SCRIPT.panelId} {
            width:min(360px,calc(100vw - 24px)) !important; max-width:calc(100vw - 24px) !important;
        }
        html:not([data-mcms-tablet-active="true"]):not([data-mcms-mobile-active="true"]) #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header {
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 32px 32px 32px !important; gap:6px !important; min-height:48px !important;
        }
        html:not([data-mcms-tablet-active="true"]):not([data-mcms-mobile-active="true"]) #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-reset-panel,.mcms-help-button,.mcms-close) { width:32px !important; height:32px !important; min-width:32px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-title { min-width:0 !important; white-space:normal !important; font-size:11px !important; line-height:1.15 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-subtitle { white-space:normal !important; font-size:9px !important; line-height:1.25 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tabs { min-width:0 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn { min-width:0 !important; overflow:hidden !important; text-overflow:ellipsis !important; font-size:9px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel[hidden] { display:none !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label { font-size:9.5px !important; line-height:1.25 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-status { font-size:9.5px !important; line-height:1.42 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-row-label { font-size:10px !important; line-height:1.3 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-label,.mcms-bookmark-name,.mcms-profile-main strong,.mcms-ui-theme-copy strong) { font-size:10.5px !important; line-height:1.2 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-pill,.mcms-heat-key,.mcms-ui-theme-copy small,.mcms-profile-main span,.mcms-build) { font-size:8.5px !important; line-height:1.25 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-input,.mcms-select,.mcms-small-btn,.mcms-position-btn,.mcms-bookmark-btn,.mcms-pin-btn) { min-height:32px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-footer { gap:4px !important; font-size:9px !important; line-height:1.35 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-wide { grid-template-columns:minmax(96px,35%) minmax(0,1fr) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-finance-vault-summary { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; gap:7px !important; }

        html:not([data-mcms-mobile-active="true"]) #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} { width:min(480px,calc(100vw - 28px)) !important; max-width:calc(100vw - 28px) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; gap:6px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filters { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; gap:6px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; gap:6px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(.mcms-critical-values-label,.mcms-critical-type-label,.mcms-critical-category-label,.mcms-critical-sort-label,.mcms-critical-age-label) { font-size:8.5px !important; line-height:1.25 !important; white-space:normal !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(.mcms-critical-value-card,.mcms-critical-type-filter,.mcms-critical-category-filter,.mcms-critical-summary-card) { min-width:0 !important; overflow:hidden !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card strong { font-size:11px !important; line-height:1.1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(.mcms-critical-value-mode,.mcms-critical-unit-extra,.mcms-critical-refreshed,.mcms-critical-showing) { font-size:8px !important; line-height:1.3 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(.mcms-critical-category-filter,.mcms-critical-type-filter) span {
            min-width:0 !important; overflow:visible !important; text-overflow:clip !important; white-space:normal !important;
            font-size:8.5px !important; line-height:1.1 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(.mcms-critical-category-filter,.mcms-critical-type-filter) strong { font-size:11px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(.mcms-critical-category-filter,.mcms-critical-type-filter) i { font-size:5.5px !important; line-height:1 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter { min-height:34px !important; padding:6px 8px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-type-filter { min-height:34px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-name { white-space:normal !important; overflow:hidden !important; display:-webkit-box !important; -webkit-line-clamp:2 !important; -webkit-box-orient:vertical !important; line-height:1.2 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-state-copy { min-width:0 !important; white-space:normal !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-card { contain:layout style !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-title { font-size:12px !important; line-height:1.2 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-body { font-size:10px !important; line-height:1.35 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} :is(.mcms-major-feed-track,.mcms-major-feed-item,.mcms-major-feed-copy) { min-width:0 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-major-feed-copy { overflow:hidden !important; text-overflow:ellipsis !important; white-space:nowrap !important; }

        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-pill,.mcms-heat-key,.mcms-ui-theme-copy small,.mcms-profile-main span,.mcms-build) { font-size:9.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-status,.mcms-row-label) { font-size:11px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(.mcms-critical-values-label,.mcms-critical-type-label,.mcms-critical-category-label,.mcms-critical-value-mode,.mcms-critical-unit-extra) { font-size:8.5px !important; }

        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tabs {
            top:40px !important; display:grid !important; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
            gap:5px !important; overflow:visible !important; padding:3px 2px 7px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn { width:100% !important; min-width:0 !important; height:38px !important; padding:0 4px !important; font-size:9.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-panel-sticky-stack { position:sticky !important; top:-8px !important; z-index:9 !important; background:rgba(6,10,15,.985) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header { position:relative !important; top:auto !important; margin:-8px -8px 5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-pill,.mcms-heat-key,.mcms-ui-theme-copy small,.mcms-profile-main span,.mcms-build) { font-size:9px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-status,.mcms-row-label) { font-size:10px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-grid-2 { align-items:stretch !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn { min-width:0 !important; overflow:hidden !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.toastId} {
            left:auto !important; right:max(10px,env(safe-area-inset-right)) !important; top:max(10px,env(safe-area-inset-top)) !important; bottom:auto !important;
            width:auto !important; max-width:min(320px,calc(100vw - 20px)) !important; transform:translateY(-6px) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.toastId}.mcms-flash { transform:translateY(0) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-grid,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filters,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(.mcms-critical-values-label,.mcms-critical-type-label,.mcms-critical-category-label,.mcms-critical-value-mode,.mcms-critical-unit-extra,.mcms-critical-refreshed,.mcms-critical-showing) { font-size:8.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} :is(button,.mcms-critical-filter,.mcms-critical-type-filter,.mcms-critical-category-filter,.mcms-critical-summary-card) { min-height:38px !important; }
        @media (max-width:380px) {
            html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tabs { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; }
            html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-values-grid,
            html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filters,
            html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary { grid-template-columns:1fr !important; }
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-panel-sticky-stack,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-panel { width:100% !important; max-width:100% !important; overflow-x:hidden !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-help-button,.mcms-close,.mcms-reset-panel) {
            display:grid !important; place-items:center !important; line-height:1 !important; padding:0 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label { font-size:9.5px !important; line-height:1.25 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-stat-label { font-size:9px !important; line-height:1.2 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-state { font-size:8.5px !important; line-height:1.1 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-log,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-empty-state { font-size:9px !important; line-height:1.35 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-alliance-text { font-size:9px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-finance-vault-summary span { font-size:9px !important; line-height:1.2 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-finance-vault-summary b { font-size:10px !important; line-height:1.2 !important; white-space:normal !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-finance-vault-summary small { font-size:9px !important; line-height:1.4 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label { font-size:10px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-ops-stat-label,.mcms-sweep-state,.mcms-alliance-text),
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} :is(.mcms-ops-stat-label,.mcms-sweep-state,.mcms-alliance-text) { font-size:9.5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.toastId} { top:calc(max(10px,env(safe-area-inset-top)) + 58px) !important; }


        /* v4.8.1: preserve MissionChief's native interaction layer above Toolkit drawers.
           Bootstrap dropdowns can be trapped inside the navbar stacking context even
           when their own z-index is high. Elevating the native navigation context and
           its transient overlays keeps profile, alliance, account and toolbar menus
           fully usable while Mission Age Watch remains open beneath them. */
        body > nav.navbar,
        body > .navbar,
        body > header.navbar,
        #navbar,
        #navbar-main,
        #navbar_main,
        .navbar.navbar-fixed-top,
        .navbar.navbar-static-top {
            z-index:1100 !important;
        }
        .navbar .dropdown.open,
        .navbar .dropdown.show,
        .navbar .btn-group.open,
        .navbar .btn-group.show,
        .navbar .nav > li.open,
        .navbar .nav > li.show,
        body > .dropdown.open,
        body > .dropdown.show {
            position:relative !important;
            z-index:1110 !important;
        }
        body .dropdown-menu,
        body .dropdown-backdrop,
        body .popover,
        body .tooltip,
        body .typeahead,
        body .ui-autocomplete {
            z-index:1120 !important;
        }
        body .modal-backdrop { z-index:1190 !important; }
        body .modal,
        body .bootbox.modal,
        body [role="dialog"][aria-modal="true"] { z-index:1200 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-reset-panel,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-reset-panel { display:none !important; }

        /* v4.9.0: compact Mission Age Watch Quick Views and Advanced Filters. */
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-deck {
            display:grid !important;
            gap:6px !important;
            margin-top:5px !important;
            padding:6px 8px 8px !important;
            border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12) !important;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12) !important;
            background:rgba(4,9,13,.36) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-overview {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto auto !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            gap:8px !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:34px !important;
            padding:5px 7px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(115,183,222,.34) !important;
            border-radius:7px !important;
            background:rgba(10,28,39,.82) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-overview-copy { display:grid !important; min-width:0 !important; gap:2px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-overview-copy small {
            color:#87c9e9 !important;
            font:950 5.6px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.42px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-overview-copy strong {
            min-width:0 !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            color:#f0f8fc !important;
            font:900 7.4px/1.15 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-overview-count {
            color:#b9cbd6 !important;
            font:900 6.1px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-overview button {
            min-height:23px !important;
            padding:3px 8px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,111,111,.62) !important;
            border-radius:5px !important;
            background:rgba(89,18,23,.78) !important;
            color:#ffd5d5 !important;
            font:950 6px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-section { display:grid !important; gap:4px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-section-head,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-group-head {
            display:flex !important;
            align-items:baseline !important;
            justify-content:space-between !important;
            gap:8px !important;
            color:#b9cbd6 !important;
            font:900 5.7px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.34px !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-section-head small,
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-group-head small {
            color:#8195a2 !important;
            font-size:5.2px !important;
            letter-spacing:.12px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-views {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:repeat(6,minmax(58px,1fr)) !important;
            gap:4px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-view {
            position:relative !important;
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:30px !important;
            gap:4px !important;
            padding:4px 7px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.20) !important;
            border-radius:6px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.055) !important;
            color:#e8f2f8 !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-view span {
            min-width:0 !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            font:950 6.4px/1.08 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            text-transform:uppercase !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-view strong { font:950 9px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-view i {
            position:absolute !important;
            top:2px !important;
            right:3px !important;
            color:currentColor !important;
            font:950 6px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-view.mcms-filter-active {
            transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
            border-color:currentColor !important;
            background:rgba(36,93,126,.88) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px currentColor,0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.28) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-view.mcms-zero:not(.mcms-filter-active),
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter.mcms-zero:not(.mcms-filter-active) { opacity:.48 !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-quick-attention { color:#ffbd73 !important; border-color:rgba(255,146,48,.54) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-quick-responding { color:#92d8ff !important; border-color:rgba(61,166,235,.58) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-quick-clearing { color:#90eab3 !important; border-color:rgba(51,196,108,.58) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-quick-stable { color:#a6edc1 !important; border-color:rgba(69,190,116,.48) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-quick-my-units { color:#f2e0a4 !important; border-color:rgba(220,196,119,.56) !important; }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-deck .mcms-critical-category-filters {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:62px repeat(4,minmax(64px,1fr)) !important;
            gap:4px !important;
            margin:0 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-deck .mcms-critical-category-filter {
            min-height:28px !important;
            padding:4px 7px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-deck .mcms-critical-category-filter span { font-size:6.3px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-deck .mcms-critical-category-filter i { font-size:5.8px !important; }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-shell { display:grid !important; gap:4px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-toggle {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            width:100% !important;
            min-height:31px !important;
            gap:8px !important;
            padding:5px 8px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(139,167,184,.38) !important;
            border-radius:6px !important;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,.045) !important;
            color:#d9e7ef !important;
            text-align:left !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-toggle > span { display:grid !important; min-width:0 !important; gap:2px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-toggle strong { font:950 6.5px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important; letter-spacing:.35px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-toggle small {
            min-width:0 !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            color:#91a5b1 !important;
            font:850 5.7px/1.1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-toggle i { font:950 12px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important; transition:transform 140ms ease !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-shell.mcms-open .mcms-critical-advanced-toggle {
            border-color:rgba(87,190,244,.66) !important;
            background:rgba(8,48,70,.68) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-shell.mcms-open .mcms-critical-advanced-toggle i { transform:rotate(180deg) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-panel {
            padding:6px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(87,190,244,.26) !important;
            border-radius:6px !important;
            background:rgba(5,15,21,.76) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-panel[hidden] { display:none !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-panel .mcms-critical-summary {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:1fr !important;
            gap:7px !important;
            margin:0 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-group { display:grid !important; gap:4px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-status-grid {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:repeat(6,minmax(56px,1fr)) !important;
            gap:4px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-condition-grid {
            display:grid !important;
            grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
            gap:4px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-panel .mcms-critical-summary-card {
            min-height:31px !important;
            padding:5px 7px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-panel .mcms-critical-summary-card span { font-size:5.8px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-panel .mcms-critical-summary-card strong { font-size:9px !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-attention { border-color:rgba(255,151,53,.72) !important; color:#ffc17d !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-summary-attention.mcms-filter-active { background:rgba(99,44,4,.90) !important; }

        #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-list { margin-top:5px !important; }

        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-views,
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-status-grid {
            grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-deck .mcms-critical-category-filters {
            grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-deck .mcms-critical-category-label {
            grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
            min-height:16px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-deck { padding:5px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-overview {
            grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-overview-count { grid-column:1 / 2 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-overview button { grid-column:2 / 3 !important; grid-row:1 / 3 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-views,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-status-grid,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-condition-grid {
            grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-deck .mcms-critical-category-filters {
            grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-deck .mcms-critical-category-label { grid-column:1 / -1 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-view,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-toggle,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-toggle i {
            transition:none !important;
            box-shadow:none !important;
            filter:none !important;
        }

        /*
         * v4.10.0 007 Intelligence asset-package overhaul.
         * Original transparent MI6 artwork hosted in the public Toolkit asset repository.
         * All operational semantic colours remain controlled by the protected status layer.
         */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] {
            --mcms-bond-black:#060709;
            --mcms-bond-ink:#101215;
            --mcms-bond-charcoal:#191c20;
            --mcms-bond-panel:#20242a;
            --mcms-bond-panel-2:#2b3036;
            --mcms-bond-ivory:#f4efdf;
            --mcms-bond-paper:#ded6c2;
            --mcms-bond-gold:#d6b65f;
            --mcms-bond-gold-bright:#f4dc91;
            --mcms-bond-red:#a71924;
            --mcms-bond-steel:#9099a2;
            --mcms-bond-muted:#b8bec4;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-bond007 {
            border:1px solid #d6b65f !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007CommandSeal}") right 5px center/38px auto no-repeat,
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007DossierGrid}") center/cover no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(145deg,#22262c,#08090b) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06),0 0 12px rgba(214,182,95,.24) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-bond007::before {
            inset:6px 44px 6px 6px !important;
            background-image:url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Logo}") !important;
            filter:invert(1) sepia(.24) saturate(.7) brightness(1.25) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-bond007::after {
            content:"SIS" !important;
            right:6px !important;
            bottom:3px !important;
            color:#f2d982 !important;
            font-size:5px !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-shell {
            border-color:rgba(231,205,127,.78) !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Gunbarrel}") right -35px bottom -35px/120px auto no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(35,39,45,.99),rgba(5,6,8,.995)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn {
            position:relative !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007CommandSeal}") center/72% auto no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(180deg,#292d33,#090a0c) !important;
            color:transparent !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn > * { opacity:0 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn::after {
            content:"00" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            right:4px !important;
            bottom:3px !important;
            color:#f1d57a !important;
            font:950 6px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.7px !important;
        }
