        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} {
            isolation:isolate !important;
            border:1px solid #b89643 !important;
            border-radius:3px !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007DossierGrid}") center/cover no-repeat,
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Gunbarrel}") right -120px bottom -140px/470px auto no-repeat,
                radial-gradient(circle at 90% 10%,rgba(214,182,95,.13),transparent 31%),
                linear-gradient(145deg,#20242a,#07080a 69%) !important;
            color:#f2ecdd !important;
            box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,.72),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.04),0 0 22px rgba(172,135,46,.14) !important;
        }
        html:not([data-mcms-tablet-active="true"]):not([data-mcms-mobile-active="true"])[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} {
            width:min(420px,calc(100vw - 24px)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header {
            min-height:62px !important;
            padding-right:10px !important;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(231,205,127,.72) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.075),rgba(255,255,255,.012) 55%,rgba(214,182,95,.045)) !important;
        }
        html:not([data-mcms-tablet-active="true"]):not([data-mcms-mobile-active="true"])[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before {
            right:122px !important;
            top:15px !important;
            width:62px !important;
            height:27px !important;
            background-image:url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Logo}") !important;
            background-size:contain !important;
            background-position:center !important;
            background-repeat:no-repeat !important;
            filter:invert(1) sepia(.24) saturate(.68) brightness(1.3) !important;
            opacity:.9 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::after {
            content:"SIS // SECTION 00 // EYES ONLY" !important;
            left:14px !important;
            bottom:5px !important;
            color:#d8b45f !important;
            font:900 6px/1 Consolas,monospace !important;
            letter-spacing:1.05px !important;
            opacity:.92 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-drag-handle {
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:60px !important;
            padding:9px 76px 15px 16px !important;
            border-left:4px solid #a71924 !important;
            background:transparent !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-title {
            max-width:100% !important;
            overflow:visible !important;
            color:#fff9ea !important;
            font:700 clamp(15px,1.5vw,21px)/1.04 Georgia,"Times New Roman",serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.45px !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
            overflow-wrap:anywhere !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-subtitle {
            max-width:100% !important;
            overflow:visible !important;
            color:#c2c5c7 !important;
            font-size:9px !important;
            line-height:1.15 !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
            overflow-wrap:anywhere !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tabs {
            position:relative !important;
            gap:3px !important;
            padding:5px !important;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(214,182,95,.45) !important;
            background:rgba(5,6,8,.88) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tabs::after {
            content:"" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            left:8px !important;
            right:8px !important;
            bottom:-1px !important;
            height:6px !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007GoldDivider}") center/100% 100% no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.65 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn {
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:40px !important;
            padding:7px 8px !important;
            border:1px solid #494f55 !important;
            border-radius:1px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#25292e,#101215) !important;
            color:#dcd7ca !important;
            font-size:10px !important;
            line-height:1.05 !important;
            letter-spacing:.4px !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
            overflow-wrap:anywhere !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn.mcms-active {
            border-color:#f0d480 !important;
            border-top:3px solid #a71924 !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f2ead5,#c9bb92) !important;
            color:#111214 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.55),0 0 11px rgba(214,182,95,.22) !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label {
            min-height:30px !important;
            padding:8px 12px 8px 38px !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(214,182,95,.55) !important;
            border-left:4px solid #a71924 !important;
            border-radius:1px !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007CommandSeal}") 9px center/20px auto no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(244,239,223,.97),rgba(210,201,178,.94)) !important;
            color:#15171a !important;
            font:950 9px/1.15 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.75px !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label::before { display:none !important; }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-place-main,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-small-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn {
            min-width:0 !important;
            border:1px solid #555b62 !important;
            border-top-color:#777d84 !important;
            border-radius:2px !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.055),transparent 42%),
                linear-gradient(145deg,#24282d,#0d0f12) !important;
            color:#eee9dc !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06),0 2px 7px rgba(0,0,0,.35) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn {
            height:auto !important;
            min-height:72px !important;
            padding-block:9px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn {
            height:auto !important;
            min-height:52px !important;
            padding-block:8px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-place-main:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-small-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn:hover {
            border-color:#d8b45f !important;
            color:#fff5d8 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08),0 0 11px rgba(214,182,95,.20) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn.mcms-active,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn.mcms-on,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn.mcms-active,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn.mcms-on,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn.mcms-active {
            border-color:#f2d67c !important;
            border-left:4px solid #a71924 !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007DossierGrid}") center/cover no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(180deg,#f4efdf,#cfc3a1) !important;
            color:#111214 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.5),0 0 12px rgba(214,182,95,.28) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn.mcms-active > *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn.mcms-on > *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn.mcms-active > *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn.mcms-on > *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn.mcms-active > * {
            color:#111214 !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-status,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-profile-main,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-stat,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ops-entry,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-history-older,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-empty-state,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-discord-empty,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-sweep-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-finance-card {
            border:1px solid rgba(214,182,95,.34) !important;
            border-radius:2px !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(214,182,95,.025),transparent 26%),
                rgba(9,11,14,.88) !important;
            color:#eee8d9 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 3px 0 rgba(167,25,36,.64) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-input,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-select,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} textarea {
            min-width:0 !important;
            border:1px solid #747a80 !important;
            border-radius:1px !important;
            background:rgba(244,239,223,.97) !important;
            color:#111214 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.18) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-input:focus,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-select:focus,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} textarea:focus {
            border-color:#d8b45f !important;
            outline:2px solid rgba(214,182,95,.27) !important;
            outline-offset:1px !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-footer {
            position:relative !important;
            min-height:38px !important;
            padding-right:74px !important;
            border-top:1px solid rgba(214,182,95,.44) !important;
            background:rgba(5,6,8,.88) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-footer::after {
            content:"" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            right:9px !important;
            bottom:2px !important;
            width:54px !important;
            height:34px !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Agent}") center 10%/contain no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.44 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} {
            border:1px solid #b89543 !important;
            border-radius:3px !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007DossierGrid}") center/cover no-repeat,
                radial-gradient(circle at 94% 5%,rgba(214,182,95,.10),transparent 30%),
                linear-gradient(145deg,#1e2227,#07080a 72%) !important;
            color:#f1ecdf !important;
            box-shadow:0 20px 52px rgba(0,0,0,.66),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.035) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-head,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-head {
            min-height:58px !important;
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(214,182,95,.62) !important;
            position:relative !important;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.055),transparent 70%) !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head::before,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-head::before,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-head::before {
            content:"" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            left:0 !important;
            right:auto !important;
            top:0 !important;
            width:4px !important;
            height:100% !important;
            background:#a71924 !important;
            filter:none !important;
            opacity:1 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head::after,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-head::after,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-head::after {
            content:"SIS // SECTION 00 // EYES ONLY" !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            left:12px !important;
            right:auto !important;
            bottom:3px !important;
            max-width:calc(100% - 150px) !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            color:#d8b45f !important;
            font:900 5.5px/1 Consolas,monospace !important;
            letter-spacing:.75px !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
            opacity:.84 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-title,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-title,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-title {
            min-width:0 !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            color:#fff8e8 !important;
            font-family:Georgia,"Times New Roman",serif !important;
            font-size:clamp(15px,1.4vw,20px) !important;
            line-height:1.05 !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-filter-deck,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-view-menu,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-advanced-panel {
            border-color:rgba(214,182,95,.35) !important;
            background:rgba(7,9,11,.88) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 3px 0 rgba(167,25,36,.55) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-view.mcms-filter-active,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter.mcms-filter-active,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary-card.mcms-filter-active {
            border-color:#f0d47d !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f2ead6,#c8ba91) !important;
            color:#111214 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px #d8b45f,0 2px 9px rgba(0,0,0,.34) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-quick-view.mcms-filter-active *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-category-filter.mcms-filter-active *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary-card.mcms-filter-active * {
            color:#111214 !important;
            text-shadow:none !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} {
            border:1px solid rgba(214,182,95,.82) !important;
            border-radius:0 !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007DossierGrid}") center/cover no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(90deg,#111418,#050607) !important;
            box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.48),inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.04) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}::before {
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007GoldDivider}") center/100% 100% no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.28 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label {
            min-width:196px !important;
            padding:6px 12px 6px 72px !important;
            border-right:1px solid #d8b45f !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007CommandSeal}") 9px center/46px auto no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(90deg,#f3ecda,#c9bb92) !important;
            color:#111214 !important;
            font-size:0 !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            letter-spacing:.65px !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label::before {
            display:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label::after {
            content:"MI6 INCIDENT WIRE" !important;
            position:static !important;
            color:#111214 !important;
            font:950 9px/1 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.65px !important;
        }

        /* 007 Intelligence payout package. */
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] {
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at center,rgba(214,182,95,.06),transparent 45%),
                rgba(0,0,0,.18) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-a {
            inset:auto !important;
            left:50% !important;
            top:50% !important;
            width:min(92vmin,820px) !important;
            aspect-ratio:1 !important;
            transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(-7deg) !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Gunbarrel}") center/contain no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.42 !important;
            animation:mcmsBondAssetBarrel 18s linear infinite !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
            inset:auto !important;
            right:max(10px,calc(50% - 515px)) !important;
            bottom:-1% !important;
            width:clamp(185px,23vw,315px) !important;
            height:min(78%,620px) !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Portrait}") right bottom/contain no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.98 !important;
            filter:drop-shadow(-14px 12px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.72)) !important;
            transform:translateZ(0) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-c {
            inset:0 !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007DossierGrid}") center/cover no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(110deg,rgba(167,25,36,.20),transparent 30% 72%,rgba(214,182,95,.12)) !important;
            opacity:.44 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            width:min(820px,calc(100% - 30px)) !important;
            min-height:340px !important;
            padding:45px 185px 34px 42px !important;
            border:1px solid #e3c871 !important;
            border-left:8px solid #a71924 !important;
            border-radius:2px !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007PayoutSeal}") right 28px bottom 28px/132px auto no-repeat,
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Logo}") right 24px top 25px/142px auto no-repeat,
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007GoldDivider}") left 32px top 77px/calc(100% - 64px) 13px no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(118deg,rgba(247,242,228,.99),rgba(211,202,177,.985)) !important;
            color:#111214 !important;
            box-shadow:0 32px 82px rgba(0,0,0,.82),0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.28),inset 0 -6px #111214 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::before {
            content:"TOP SECRET // SECTION 00 FINANCIAL AUTHORISATION" !important;
            left:35px !important;
            right:190px !important;
            top:17px !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            color:#8f171f !important;
            font:950 8px/1 Consolas,monospace !important;
            letter-spacing:1.15px !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::after {
            content:"FILE 00-7 // LONDON" !important;
            right:28px !important;
            bottom:13px !important;
            color:rgba(17,18,20,.55) !important;
            font:950 7px/1 Consolas,monospace !important;
            letter-spacing:1.3px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-tier {
            justify-self:start !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
            border-color:#9b1720 !important;
            background:#9b1720 !important;
            color:#fff !important;
            font-size:9px !important;
            letter-spacing:1.1px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title {
            width:100% !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
            padding:0 !important;
            color:#111214 !important;
            font-family:Georgia,"Times New Roman",serif !important;
            font-size:clamp(34px,5.1vw,62px) !important;
            font-weight:700 !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            padding-bottom:2px !important;
            overflow:visible !important;
            letter-spacing:.35px !important;
            text-align:left !important;
            text-shadow:0 1px #fff !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-long {
            font-size:clamp(29px,4.25vw,50px) !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-very-long {
            font-size:clamp(24px,3.55vw,42px) !important;
            line-height:1.02 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-mission {
            width:100% !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
            color:#313438 !important;
            font:700 clamp(12px,1.65vw,17px)/1.15 Arial,sans-serif !important;
            text-align:left !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-divider {
            width:100% !important;
            height:2px !important;
            margin:10px 0 8px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,#a71924 0 19%,#111214 19% 79%,#d8b45f 79%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-source,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-kicker {
            color:#7b651f !important;
            font-size:8px !important;
            line-height:1.1 !important;
            letter-spacing:1.2px !important;
            text-align:left !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-kicker { color:#81151c !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-amount {
            width:100% !important;
            color:#111214 !important;
            font-size:clamp(28px,4.2vw,48px) !important;
            line-height:1.04 !important;
            padding-bottom:2px !important;
            overflow:visible !important;
            letter-spacing:.6px !important;
            text-align:left !important;
            text-shadow:0 1px #fff,2px 2px rgba(184,152,66,.30) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-particles { display:none !important; }

        @keyframes mcmsBondAssetBarrel {
            from { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(-7deg); }
            to { transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(353deg); }
        }

        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header {
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007CommandSeal}") right 184px center/38px auto no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.075),rgba(255,255,255,.012) 55%,rgba(214,182,95,.045)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before {
            display:block !important;
            right:113px !important;
            top:14px !important;
            width:66px !important;
            height:25px !important;
            background-image:url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Logo}") !important;
            background-size:contain !important;
            background-position:center !important;
            background-repeat:no-repeat !important;
            filter:invert(1) sepia(.24) saturate(.68) brightness(1.3) !important;
            opacity:.88 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-drag-handle {
            padding-right:146px !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header {
            min-height:58px !important;
            background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.075),rgba(255,255,255,.012) 55%,rgba(214,182,95,.045)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::before {
            display:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-drag-handle {
            min-height:56px !important;
            padding:8px 12px 14px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-title {
            font-size:15px !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
            line-height:1.02 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-subtitle {
            font-size:8px !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn {
            min-height:70px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn {
            min-height:54px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header::after {
            left:11px !important;
            bottom:4px !important;
            font-size:5px !important;
            letter-spacing:.7px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-head,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-head {
            min-height:52px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head::after,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-head::after,
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-head::after {
            max-width:calc(100% - 108px) !important;
            font-size:5px !important;
            letter-spacing:.55px !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-incident-feed-label {
            min-width:126px !important;
            padding:5px 7px 5px 42px !important;
            background-size:30px auto,auto !important;
            background-position:6px center,center !important;
            font-size:7px !important;
        }

        @media (max-width:980px) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
                right:4px !important;
                width:clamp(165px,27vw,245px) !important;
                height:70% !important;
                opacity:.92 !important;
            }
        }
        @media (max-width:700px) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b { display:none !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
                width:calc(100% - 20px) !important;
                min-height:0 !important;
                padding:44px 18px 23px !important;
                background:
                    url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Logo}") right 12px top 15px/78px auto no-repeat,
                    url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007GoldDivider}") left 16px top 66px/calc(100% - 32px) 10px no-repeat,
                    linear-gradient(118deg,rgba(247,242,228,.99),rgba(211,202,177,.985)) !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::before {
                left:16px !important;
                right:98px !important;
                top:14px !important;
                font-size:6px !important;
                letter-spacing:.65px !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::after {
                right:15px !important;
                bottom:9px !important;
                font-size:5.5px !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title {
                font-size:clamp(25px,8.5vw,41px) !important;
                line-height:.96 !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-long {
                font-size:clamp(21px,7.2vw,34px) !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-very-long {
                font-size:clamp(18px,6vw,29px) !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-mission { font-size:clamp(10px,3.5vw,14px) !important; }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-amount { font-size:clamp(23px,7.4vw,36px) !important; }
        }

        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-shell,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId},
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"][data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} {
            background-image:none !important;
            background-color:#0b0d10 !important;
            box-shadow:none !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-a,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b,
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-c { display:none !important; }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            background-image:none !important;
            background-color:#e6ddc6 !important;
            box-shadow:none !important;
        }



        /* v4.10.1 Daniel Craig 007 payout portrait fit hardening. */
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
            background-position:right bottom !important;
            background-repeat:no-repeat !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            isolation:isolate !important;
        }
        @media (max-height:640px) and (min-width:701px) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
                height:72% !important;
                width:clamp(150px,20vw,250px) !important;
            }
        }

        /* v4.10.0 fit and readability hardening. */
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header > *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head > *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-head > *,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-head > * {
            min-width:0 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn strong,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn strong,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn strong,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-place-main strong,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} button,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} button,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} button {
            overflow-wrap:anywhere !important;
            word-break:normal !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-title,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-title,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="bond007"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-title {
            max-width:100% !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner > * {
            min-width:0 !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-mission,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-amount {
            overflow-wrap:anywhere !important;
            word-break:normal !important;
        }
        @media (max-width:430px) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
                padding-inline:14px !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::before {
                right:88px !important;
                letter-spacing:.45px !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-source,
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-kicker {
                font-size:7px !important;
                letter-spacing:.75px !important;
            }
        }

        @media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-a { animation:none !important; }
        }

        /* v4.10.2: translucent 007 dossier with a protected reading field and portrait reveal zone. */
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
            right:max(0px,calc(50% - 395px)) !important;
            bottom:-2% !important;
            width:clamp(230px,28vw,360px) !important;
            height:min(90%,700px) !important;
            opacity:1 !important;
            filter:drop-shadow(-12px 14px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.68)) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            width:min(880px,calc(100% - 30px)) !important;
            min-height:340px !important;
            padding:45px 300px 34px 42px !important;
            border-right-color:rgba(227,200,113,.28) !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007PayoutSeal}") right 112px bottom 25px/112px auto no-repeat,
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Logo}") right 24px top 23px/138px auto no-repeat,
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007GoldDivider}") left 32px top 77px/calc(64% - 32px) 13px no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(90deg,
                    rgba(247,242,228,.995) 0%,
                    rgba(244,238,222,.985) 55%,
                    rgba(239,231,209,.94) 64%,
                    rgba(228,216,187,.76) 72%,
                    rgba(217,202,166,.42) 80%,
                    rgba(205,187,143,.14) 88%,
                    rgba(205,187,143,0) 97%) !important;
            -webkit-backdrop-filter:none !important;
            backdrop-filter:none !important;
            box-shadow:
                0 32px 82px rgba(0,0,0,.78),
                0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.22),
                inset 0 -6px rgba(17,18,20,.92) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::before {
            right:306px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::after {
            right:304px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-mission,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-source,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-kicker,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-amount {
            position:relative !important;
            z-index:4 !important;
            padding-inline:0 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-mission,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-amount {
            text-shadow:0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.92),0 2px 8px rgba(247,242,228,.70) !important;
        }

        @media (max-width:980px) and (min-width:701px) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
                right:max(0px,calc(50% - 330px)) !important;
                width:clamp(190px,28vw,270px) !important;
                height:82% !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
                width:calc(100% - 24px) !important;
                padding:44px 235px 30px 30px !important;
                background:
                    url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007PayoutSeal}") right 88px bottom 22px/92px auto no-repeat,
                    url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Logo}") right 17px top 20px/105px auto no-repeat,
                    url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007GoldDivider}") left 24px top 73px/calc(65% - 24px) 11px no-repeat,
                    linear-gradient(90deg,
                        rgba(247,242,228,.995) 0%,
                        rgba(244,238,222,.985) 53%,
                        rgba(239,231,209,.92) 62%,
                        rgba(228,216,187,.70) 71%,
                        rgba(217,202,166,.34) 81%,
                        rgba(205,187,143,.10) 90%,
                        rgba(205,187,143,0) 98%) !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::before,
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::after {
                right:238px !important;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width:700px) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
                display:none !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
                width:calc(100% - 20px) !important;
                min-height:0 !important;
                padding:44px 18px 23px !important;
                background:
                    url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007Logo}") right 12px top 15px/78px auto no-repeat,
                    url("${THEME_ASSETS.bond007GoldDivider}") left 16px top 66px/calc(100% - 32px) 10px no-repeat,
                    linear-gradient(118deg,rgba(247,242,228,.995),rgba(211,202,177,.99)) !important;
                border-right-color:#e3c871 !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::before {
                left:16px !important;
                right:98px !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::after {
                right:15px !important;
            }
        }

        @media (max-height:640px) and (min-width:701px) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
                height:76% !important;
                width:clamp(190px,24vw,290px) !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
                min-height:300px !important;
                padding-top:40px !important;
                padding-bottom:27px !important;
            }
        }

        /* v4.10.3: keep the 007 payout clear of the expanded map command toolbar. */
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            top:var(--mcms-payout-banner-top,50%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            min-height:0 !important;
            max-height:var(--mcms-payout-safe-height,calc(100% - 14px)) !important;
            padding:34px clamp(225px,30vw,300px) 18px 38px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::before {
            top:8px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner::after {
            bottom:7px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title {
            font-size:clamp(27px,4.15vw,50px) !important;
            line-height:.93 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-long {
            font-size:clamp(24px,3.65vw,43px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-title.mcms-payout-title-very-long {
            font-size:clamp(21px,3.15vw,37px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-mission {
            margin-top:5px !important;
            font-size:clamp(11px,1.45vw,15px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-divider {
            margin:6px 0 5px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-source {
            margin-top:3px !important;
            font-size:7px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-kicker {
            font-size:8px !important;
            line-height:.95 !important;
            letter-spacing:1.15px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-amount {
            margin-top:4px !important;
            font-size:clamp(25px,3.55vw,40px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
            bottom:var(--mcms-payout-safe-bottom-offset,-2%) !important;
            height:min(72%,var(--mcms-payout-safe-height,700px)) !important;
            width:clamp(185px,24vw,300px) !important;
        }
        @media (max-width:980px) and (min-width:701px) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-banner {
                padding:33px clamp(205px,29vw,238px) 17px 28px !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
                width:clamp(165px,25vw,235px) !important;
            }
        }

        /* v4.10.4: ground the cropped 007 portrait below the protected toolbar line. */
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
            bottom:-7% !important;
            height:min(96%,760px) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
            bottom:calc(var(--mcms-payout-safe-bottom-offset,-2%) - clamp(42px,6vh,58px)) !important;
            height:min(82%,calc(var(--mcms-payout-safe-height,700px) + 54px)) !important;
        }
        @media (max-width:980px) and (min-width:701px) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
                bottom:-6% !important;
                height:90% !important;
            }
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}.mcms-payout-controls-safe[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
                bottom:calc(var(--mcms-payout-safe-bottom-offset,-2%) - clamp(26px,4vh,34px)) !important;
                width:clamp(190px,34vw,255px) !important;
                height:min(82%,calc(var(--mcms-payout-safe-height,700px) + 34px)) !important;
            }
        }
        @media (max-width:700px) {
            #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="jamesBond"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
                display:none !important;
            }
        }

        /* v4.11.0: compact Smart Bookmark Labels; theme colours and artwork remain untouched. */
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pins {
            display:flex !important;
            flex-wrap:wrap !important;
            grid-template-columns:none !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            align-content:flex-start !important;
            justify-content:flex-start !important;
            gap:5px !important;
            width:auto !important;
            max-width:min(360px,calc(100vw - 24px)) !important;
            max-height:132px !important;
            overflow-y:auto !important;
            overflow-x:hidden !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn {
            flex:0 0 auto !important;
            width:auto !important;
            min-width:52px !important;
            max-width:112px !important;
            height:29px !important;
            padding:0 10px !important;
            font-size:9px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            letter-spacing:.18px !important;
            text-align:center !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-name-btn {
            appearance:none !important;
            -webkit-appearance:none !important;
            display:flex !important;
            flex-direction:column !important;
            align-items:flex-start !important;
            justify-content:center !important;
            gap:2px !important;
            min-width:0 !important;
            min-height:30px !important;
            padding:0 2px !important;
            border:0 !important;
            background:transparent !important;
            color:inherit !important;
            line-height:1.05 !important;
            text-align:left !important;
            cursor:pointer !important;
            white-space:normal !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-name-main {
            display:block !important;
            width:100% !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-short {
            display:block !important;
            max-width:100% !important;
            color:rgba(255,255,255,.55) !important;
            font-size:7px !important;
            line-height:1 !important;
            font-weight:900 !important;
            letter-spacing:.35px !important;
            white-space:nowrap !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
            text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-name-btn:hover .mcms-bookmark-name-main,
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-name-btn:focus-visible .mcms-bookmark-name-main {
            text-decoration:underline !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pins {
            display:flex !important;
            flex-wrap:wrap !important;
            justify-content:flex-start !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            gap:5px !important;
            width:100% !important;
            max-width:none !important;
            max-height:none !important;
            overflow:visible !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-tablet-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn {
            flex:0 0 auto !important;
            width:auto !important;
            min-width:56px !important;
            max-width:126px !important;
            height:var(--mcms-tablet-pin-height,31px) !important;
            padding:0 11px !important;
            border-radius:9px !important;
            font-size:10px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pins {
            display:flex !important;
            flex-wrap:wrap !important;
            justify-content:flex-start !important;
            align-items:center !important;
            gap:4px !important;
            width:100% !important;
            max-width:none !important;
            overflow:visible !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn {
            flex:0 0 auto !important;
            width:auto !important;
            min-width:50px !important;
            max-width:98px !important;
            height:var(--mcms-mobile-pin-height,30px) !important;
            padding:0 8px !important;
            border-radius:8px !important;
            font-size:clamp(8.5px,2.15vw,9.5px) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-economy="true"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn {
            backdrop-filter:none !important;
            -webkit-backdrop-filter:none !important;
        }


        /* v4.13.0 Hyrule Command flagship interface */
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-hyrule {
            position:relative !important;
            border-color:#e9c85b !important;
            border-radius:8px 8px 5px 5px !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleEye}") center / 25px 25px no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(155deg,#243b2d 0 48%,#0d2e3a 49% 72%,#6a4b1e 73% 100%) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,247,171,.25),inset 0 -8px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.42),0 0 11px rgba(92,241,221,.20) !important;
            overflow:hidden !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-hyrule::before {
            content:'△' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            left:5px !important;
            top:3px !important;
            color:#ffe77d !important;
            font:900 12px/1 Georgia,serif !important;
            text-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(255,214,69,.75) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-hyrule::after {
            content:'HYRULE' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            right:4px !important;
            bottom:3px !important;
            color:#c9fff4 !important;
            font:900 4.5px/1 "Arial Narrow",sans-serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.55px !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-preview-hyrule span { opacity:0 !important; }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] {
            --mcms-hyrule-forest:#132c22;
            --mcms-hyrule-forest-2:#203c2b;
            --mcms-hyrule-night:#061319;
            --mcms-hyrule-parchment:#dfc88d;
            --mcms-hyrule-parchment-soft:#f1dfaa;
            --mcms-hyrule-gold:#e8bf4d;
            --mcms-hyrule-gold-bright:#fff09a;
            --mcms-hyrule-blue:#3de7e5;
            --mcms-hyrule-blue-deep:#168cae;
            --mcms-hyrule-green:#50ec8c;
            --mcms-hyrule-green-deep:#167555;
            --mcms-hyrule-crimson:#e44f59;
            --mcms-hyrule-amber:#f4a83c;
            --mcms-hyrule-ink:#0a1110;
            --mcms-hyrule-shadow:rgba(0,0,0,.72);
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} {
            font-family:"Palatino Linotype",Palatino,Georgia,serif !important;
            color:#f8efd0 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} {
            filter:drop-shadow(0 10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,.42)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-shell {
            position:relative !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(244,210,101,.86) !important;
            border-radius:14px !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,240,164,.08),transparent 24%),
                linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(20,52,39,.96),rgba(6,22,27,.96) 64%,rgba(54,35,16,.94)) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(95,63,24,.82),inset 0 1px rgba(255,248,189,.22),0 10px 26px rgba(0,0,0,.46),0 0 18px rgba(42,224,210,.09) !important;
            overflow:visible !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-shell::before {
            content:'' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            width:42px !important;
            height:42px !important;
            left:-13px !important;
            top:-15px !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleCrest}") center/contain no-repeat !important;
            filter:drop-shadow(0 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.64)) !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
            z-index:5 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn {
            border-color:rgba(255,225,111,.92) !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleEye}") center/64% 64% no-repeat,
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 38%,rgba(72,238,229,.24),transparent 60%),
                linear-gradient(155deg,#1d4636,#091c23 70%) !important;
            color:#fff3b1 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(87,54,18,.88),0 0 13px rgba(54,230,220,.25) !important;
            text-shadow:0 1px 2px #000 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-menu-btn:focus-visible {
            border-color:#fff3a1 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(120,74,22,.9),0 0 17px rgba(74,255,236,.48),0 0 7px rgba(255,222,83,.55) !important;
            transform:translateY(-1px) scale(1.025) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-dock-toggle-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn {
            border:1px solid rgba(223,190,84,.72) !important;
            border-radius:9px !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(251,224,139,.09),transparent 36%),
                linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(34,64,44,.96),rgba(8,25,29,.96)) !important;
            color:#f1e7c0 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(67,43,18,.76),0 4px 9px rgba(0,0,0,.26) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-key {
            border-color:rgba(102,245,227,.58) !important;
            background:rgba(4,30,34,.74) !important;
            color:#9ffff1 !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 7px rgba(50,225,218,.24) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-float-btn.mcms-on,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn.mcms-on {
            border-color:#8cffe1 !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(75,237,136,.42),rgba(20,113,88,.34)),
                linear-gradient(145deg,#204e37,#0b2830) !important;
            color:#efffda !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,235,126,.30),0 0 13px rgba(66,239,174,.38) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pin-btn.mcms-pin-custom {
            border-color:rgba(80,227,230,.76) !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} {
            position:fixed !important;
            border:1px solid rgba(244,208,94,.92) !important;
            border-radius:16px !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(rgba(7,23,25,.89),rgba(7,23,25,.94)),
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleMap}") center/cover no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(145deg,#1e3a2a,#071b21 68%,#3a2410) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 3px rgba(87,55,19,.88),inset 0 0 55px rgba(0,0,0,.42),0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.60),0 0 28px rgba(54,224,211,.12) !important;
            backdrop-filter:blur(12px) saturate(118%) !important;
            -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px) saturate(118%) !important;
            overflow-x:hidden !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}::before {
            content:'' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            right:-52px !important;
            top:72px !important;
            width:235px !important;
            height:235px !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleSwordShield}") center/contain no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.16 !important;
            filter:drop-shadow(0 10px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.65)) !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
            z-index:0 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}::after {
            content:'' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            left:-68px !important;
            bottom:45px !important;
            width:220px !important;
            height:220px !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleEnergyRing}") center/contain no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.13 !important;
            pointer-events:none !important;
            animation:mcmsHyruleRuneTurn 26s linear infinite !important;
            z-index:0 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} > * { position:relative !important; z-index:1 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}::-webkit-scrollbar { width:8px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background:rgba(5,23,25,.76) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:linear-gradient(#f1d068,#8c5b1d) !important; border:2px solid #14281f !important; border-radius:10px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-head,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-head,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-head {
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(237,197,75,.72) !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleCrest}") 12px center/44px 36px no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(78,47,15,.94),rgba(21,57,42,.92) 32%,rgba(7,31,36,.92) 72%,rgba(75,46,16,.90)) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 -1px rgba(255,242,163,.15),0 5px 17px rgba(0,0,0,.24) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-header { padding-left:54px !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-title,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-title,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-title,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-title {
            color:#fff0a1 !important;
            font-family:Georgia,"Palatino Linotype",serif !important;
            font-weight:900 !important;
            letter-spacing:.75px !important;
            text-shadow:0 2px 2px #000,0 0 12px rgba(255,215,79,.28) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-subtitle,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-drawer-subtitle {
            color:rgba(196,255,240,.72) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tabs {
            border-bottom:1px solid rgba(232,193,72,.44) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(19,55,42,.82),rgba(5,24,29,.82)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn {
            border-color:transparent !important;
            color:rgba(239,227,184,.70) !important;
            background:transparent !important;
            font-family:Georgia,"Palatino Linotype",serif !important;
            letter-spacing:.25px !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn:hover {
            color:#fff3ad !important;
            background:rgba(63,177,139,.12) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-tab-btn.mcms-active {
            color:#fff3a1 !important;
            background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(86,207,163,.19),rgba(14,62,57,.34)) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 -2px #4bf0dd,0 2px 10px rgba(47,226,216,.15) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label {
            color:#ffe887 !important;
            border-color:rgba(232,191,68,.44) !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(111,74,25,.45),rgba(26,78,57,.28),transparent) !important;
            text-shadow:0 1px 2px #000 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-section-label::before { color:#62f4dd !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-place-main,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-small-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} input,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} select,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} textarea {
            border-color:rgba(213,174,60,.55) !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(245,218,133,.055),transparent 35%),
                linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(31,65,45,.88),rgba(7,26,31,.92)) !important;
            color:#f6edd0 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(66,41,16,.72),0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.20) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-place-main:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-small-btn:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn:hover {
            border-color:#77f6df !important;
            background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(40,98,66,.96),rgba(8,42,47,.96)) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,231,132,.24),0 0 12px rgba(57,229,214,.23) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-theme-btn.mcms-active,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-toggle-btn.mcms-on,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-position-btn.mcms-active,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pin-btn.mcms-on,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-ui-theme-btn.mcms-active {
            border-color:#fff09a !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(79,231,133,.34),rgba(29,128,97,.34)),
                linear-gradient(145deg,#28543a,#0a3038) !important;
            color:#fff9d7 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(101,252,229,.45),0 0 14px rgba(66,235,198,.30),0 0 6px rgba(255,213,76,.25) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-pill,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-float-key {
            border-color:rgba(78,235,220,.55) !important;
            background:rgba(4,32,37,.68) !important;
            color:#a8fff2 !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-profile-main,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-setting-row,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-payout-history-item {
            border-color:rgba(211,172,60,.34) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(52,71,41,.45),rgba(6,27,31,.65)) !important;
        }

        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId},
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} {
            border:1px solid rgba(236,196,72,.86) !important;
            background:
                linear-gradient(rgba(6,24,28,.92),rgba(6,24,28,.95)),
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleMap}") center/cover no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(145deg,#1d3929,#081a21) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(79,51,18,.78),0 12px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.52),0 0 20px rgba(51,222,209,.10) !important;
            backdrop-filter:blur(10px) !important;
            -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(10px) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-summary-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-value-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId} .mcms-inspector-card,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId} .mcms-vehicle-status-row,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-major-feed-item {
            border-color:rgba(219,181,65,.40) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(38,70,47,.72),rgba(6,28,33,.78)) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(63,39,14,.52),0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.18) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId} .mcms-critical-row:hover,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId} .mcms-major-feed-item:hover {
            border-color:rgba(99,244,221,.72) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(46,96,62,.86),rgba(7,43,47,.86)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-critical-state-no-scene { color:#ffca67 !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-critical-state-enroute { color:#62e7ff !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-critical-state-assistance { color:#ff6f72 !important; text-shadow:0 0 9px rgba(255,67,79,.45) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-critical-state-clearing { color:#77f59c !important; text-shadow:0 0 9px rgba(62,232,132,.38) !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-critical-state-on-scene { color:#ffe77d !important; }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-mission-age-badge {
            border-color:rgba(238,197,72,.78) !important;
            background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(28,67,47,.94),rgba(5,28,33,.94)) !important;
            color:#fff2a8 !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(95,61,20,.68),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.28) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-age-critical,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-critical-assistance {
            border-color:#ef6067 !important;
            background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(100,27,32,.95),rgba(33,10,18,.95)) !important;
            color:#ffe8d5 !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 13px rgba(229,64,76,.42) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-mission-lock-travel-overlay {
            background:radial-gradient(circle at center,rgba(68,250,223,.10),transparent 58%) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-mission-lock-reticle,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-mission-lock-bracket,
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-mission-lock-beam {
            border-color:#65f8e4 !important;
            color:#65f8e4 !important;
            filter:drop-shadow(0 0 7px rgba(74,236,224,.70)) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-mission-spawn-ring {
            border-color:#ffe875 !important;
            box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(255,220,79,.62),inset 0 0 10px rgba(68,244,217,.44) !important;
        }
        html[data-mcms-ui-theme="hyrule"] .mcms-mission-spawn-label {
            border-color:#e7c14e !important;
            background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(37,75,49,.97),rgba(5,28,33,.97)) !important;
            color:#fff0a0 !important;
        }

        /* Hyrule Quest Reward payout */
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] {
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 44%,rgba(79,239,196,.10),transparent 35%),
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 110%,rgba(255,209,65,.12),transparent 48%),
                linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(2,12,16,.46),rgba(2,12,16,.72)) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-red {
            background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 0% 58%,rgba(42,238,158,.60),rgba(26,112,85,.24) 31%,transparent 66%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-blue {
            background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 100% 46%,rgba(55,225,244,.64),rgba(28,101,140,.25) 31%,transparent 66%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-cinematic {
            background:
                linear-gradient(rgba(4,20,22,.42),rgba(4,20,22,.54)),
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleMap}") center/cover no-repeat !important;
            filter:saturate(118%) contrast(106%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-a {
            inset:-12% !important;
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,transparent 0 23%,rgba(75,255,219,.13) 23.5% 24.2%,transparent 25% 36%,rgba(255,221,83,.11) 36.5% 37.2%,transparent 38%),
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleEnergyRing}") center/42vmin 42vmin no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.75 !important;
            animation:mcmsHyruleRuneTurn 16s linear infinite !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-b {
            inset:0 !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleEye}") 50% 22%/18vmin 18vmin no-repeat,
                radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%,rgba(81,255,225,.10),transparent 48%) !important;
            filter:drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(59,234,225,.45)) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-theme-fx-c {
            inset:-4% !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleRupeeBurst}") center/cover no-repeat !important;
            filter:drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(255,230,112,.35)) !important;
            opacity:.70 !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-banner {
            width:min(760px,88%) !important;
            min-height:250px !important;
            padding:39px clamp(28px,7vw,104px) 34px !important;
            border:2px solid #e7bd48 !important;
            border-radius:22px 22px 15px 15px !important;
            background:
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleQuestSeal}") left 12px center/134px 134px no-repeat,
                url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleQuestSeal}") right 12px center/134px 134px no-repeat,
                linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,239,172,.10),transparent 28%),
                linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(32,69,47,.96),rgba(6,26,31,.97) 62%,rgba(63,39,15,.94)) !important;
            box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 4px rgba(83,50,15,.88),inset 0 0 35px rgba(0,0,0,.34),0 18px 46px rgba(0,0,0,.62),0 0 26px rgba(68,242,213,.18),0 0 11px rgba(255,216,67,.32) !important;
            clip-path:polygon(4% 0,96% 0,100% 13%,100% 87%,96% 100%,4% 100%,0 87%,0 13%) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-banner::before,
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-banner::after {
            content:'' !important;
            position:absolute !important;
            top:9px !important;
            width:72px !important;
            height:72px !important;
            background:url("${THEME_ASSETS.hyruleCrest}") center/contain no-repeat !important;
            opacity:.62 !important;
            filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.65)) !important;
        }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-banner::before { left:50% !important; transform:translateX(-50%) !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-banner::after { display:none !important; }
        #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}[data-template="hyruleQuest"] .mcms-payout-tier {
